476885.Title: Bench - Halfway Home
476885.Description: On a ledge inside the building.

476886.Title: TRAPPED Bench - Hunter's March
476886.Description: **Required:** Walk into a secret room on the left and whack a [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478293) to deactivate the trap.

476887.Title: Bench - Deep Docks
476887.Description:
Appears after ringing a bell.

_Tip: Leave and re-enter the room to skip the bell animation._

476888.Title: Bench - Deep Docks
476888.Description: Reached by defeating an [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479340), then climbing up through a trapdoor.

476889.Title: Bench - Pilgrim's Rest
476889.Description:
Inside a building.

**Required:** Pay 30 Rosary toll for each visit

_Tip: You can break the gear above the door to permanently force the door open. Give it a good whack!_

476890.Title: Bench - Far Fields
476890.Description: Inside the hot air balloon suspended in the middle of the room.

476892.Title: Temporary Bench - The Marrow
476892.Description: Disappears when the Flea Caravan move to Greymoor.

476894.Title: Bench - Shellwood
476894.Description: In an area that can only be reached after beginning the [Rite of Rebirth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792) Wish.

476896.Title: Secret Room
476896.Description: Jump up and to the right of your starting point to enter it.

476897.Title: Secret Room
476897.Description: The entrance is under the rib cage

476898.Title: Shell Shards
476898.Description: At the top of the secret room, entered through a hole at the bottom of the rib cage [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476897).

476900.Title: Mossberry
476900.Description:
On a branch in the upper corner of the room.

_Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

476901.Title: Shell Shards
476901.Description: At the top of a spiky side-room.

476905.Title: Shell Shards
476905.Description:
Inside the [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476896). 

Hit the statue a few times to receive 20 shards.

476907.Title: Shell Shards
476907.Description: Drop down from above to reach it.

476909.Title: Mossberry
476909.Description:
**Required:** [Silkspear](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477871) (or bounce off an enemy's head with your downward attack)

_Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

476911.Title: Locked Gate
476911.Description: **Required:** [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915) to reach the corresponding lever on the ledge above it.

476915.Title: Lace
476915.Description:
**Reward:**
- [Pharloom's Welcome](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478311)

**Warning:** This fight and its achievement are **missable** if you go to Blasted Steps or Sinner's Road via the Wormways, or move the Flea Caravan to Greymoor without fighting Lace here first.

476917.Title: Locked Gate
476917.Description: Hit a lever on its western side to unlock it.

476920.Title: Shell Shards
476920.Description: On your left after jumping off the elevator while it moves.

476921.Title: Lore Tablet
476921.Description:
Take a right when you reach the bottom of the elevator, climb the ledges, and hit a lever to reach it.

_At the seventh bell toll, send:_

_Thirty measures, four beats Smokerock,_

_Eight beats Sweetsmelt,_

_Mark of fealty, all workers._

_At the ninth bell toll, send:_

_Twenty measures, two beats Smokerock,_

_Seven beats Sweetsmelt,_

_Mark of fealty, all workers._

476922.Title: Locked Door - Simple
476922.Description:
**Required:** [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915) and  [Simple Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477839)

Can be circumvented by going through [this door](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477987).

476924.Title: Locked Gate
476924.Description: At the bottom of the pit. Can be opened by pressing the button on the eastern side.

477834.Title: The Great Citadel
477834.Description:
_Ascend through the lands of Pharloom to reach the Citadel at the kingdom's peak._

**Next Objective:** [Grand Gate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478544)

477837.Title: Pebb
477837.Description:
**Store:**
- [Magnitete Brooch ](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477841)- 120 Rosaries
- [Mask Shard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477840) - 300 Rosaries
- [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477838)  - 60 Rosaries
- [Simple Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477839) - 500 Rosaries
- Rosary String - 80 Rosaries

477838.Title: Craftmetal
477838.Description: Can be bought from [Pebb](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477837) for 60 rosaries

477839.Title: Simple Key
477839.Description: Can be bought from [Pebb](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477837) for 500 rosaries

477840.Title: Mask Shard
477840.Description: Can be bought from [Pebb](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477837) for 300 rosaries

477841.Title: Magnetite Brooch
477841.Description:
Can be bought from [Pebb](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477837) for 120 rosaries

In [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260), the item can be bought from [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522)

**Effect:** Any loose rosaries will be pulled toward the wearer

477843.Title: Shell Shards
477843.Description: In the upper corner of the area.

477848.Title: Shard Pendant
477848.Description: **Effect:** Collect more shell shards from defeated creatures

477849.Title: Rosary
477849.Description: At the edge of the room, near a spike pit.

477850.Title: Shakra - The Marrow
477850.Description:
**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Quill ](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosaries
- [Compass ](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries

477858.Title: Locked Gate
477858.Description:
Opens when you whack a lever on the eastern side

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

477860.Title: Frayed Rosary String
477860.Description: At the bottom of some steps. Watch out for falling rocks as you approach.

477861.Title: Locked Trapdoor
477861.Description: Opened by hitting a lever on the northern side.

477864.Title: Rosary
477864.Description: In the south-western corner of the room.

477865.Title: Locked Trapdoor
477865.Description: Opened by a lever on a ledge above it.

477868.Title: Frayed Rosary String
477868.Description: Held by a corpse near a suspended platform. Can only be reached by getting through the [Silk Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477872)

477871.Title: Silkspear
477871.Description:
**Effect:** Attack by throwing the needle forward. Silk will be expended.

_Tip: You can use this ability to release the [Bell Beast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477879)._

477874.Title: Moss Druid
477874.Description:
[Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish

**Note:** After the wish is completed, delivering extra Mossberries will give rosaries, with the fourth unlocking an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255) tool - [Druid's Eyes](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480493).

477877.Title: Mossberry
477877.Description:
Held by a flying enemy.

_Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

477879.Title: Bell Beast
477879.Description:
Use the [Silkspear](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477871) to set it free and begin the fight.

**Reward:**
- [Silk Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477881)
- Unlocks fast travel

477881.Title: Silk Heart
477881.Description:
Defeat [Bell Beast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477879).

Regain the power to regenerate Silk within one's shell.

477884.Title: Bone Bottom Repairs
477884.Description:
On the Objective board

**Donate:** 200 Shell Shards

**Reward:**
- None

477885.Title: Garb of the Pilgrims
477885.Description:
On the Objective board

**Hunt**

**Reward:**
- Rosary Necklace (120 Rosaries)

477886.Title: Shakra - Bone Bottom
477886.Description:
If she's not there, hit the ring on the platform a few times to summon her.

**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Hunter's March Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479518) - 70 Rosaries
- [Greymoor Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479527) - 70 Rosaries
- [Bellhart Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479529) - 40 Rosaries
- [Shellwood Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479530) - 70 Rosaries
- [Sinner's Road Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479526) - 90 Rosaries
- [Blasted Steps Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479673) - 70 Rosaries
- [Wormways Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479523) - 70 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosary
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries

477887.Title: Bench - The Marrow
477887.Description:
Appears after hitting a lever and ringing a bell.

_Tip: You can leave and re-enter the room to skip the bell animation._

477888.Title: Lore Tablet
477888.Description:
_In the air. The water. Everywhere._

_Inside their shells. Twisted inside. Guts._

_Tightest around heart. Pulsing rhythm._

_Sick. Alive. Dead?_

_Something worse._

_Deeper. Must look deeper._

477889.Title: Breakable Wall
477889.Description: Hit the explosive rock on the western side after beginning the [Rite of Rebirth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792) Wish.

477892.Title: Rosary
477892.Description: At the end of a short tunnel by the spikes. Guarded by a Skull Brute.

477893.Title: Shell Shards
477893.Description: On the ceiling above a fragile platform.

477894.Title: Craftmetal
477894.Description: At the end of a boobytrapped tunnel in the [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477990).

477896.Title: Rosary
477896.Description: Hanging from the ceiling. To reach it, perform diagonal slashes on the red fruit in the room below.

477898.Title: Grindle
477898.Description:
Behind a locked door inside the building. Hit the door to break it open.

Return to the building after resting at a bench to find him near the dummies - you can then hand over rosaries for tips.

477899.Title: Straight Pin
477899.Description:
On the upper level of [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477898)'s cell.

_Light throwing tool, designed for rapid attacks._

477903.Title: Shell Shards
477903.Description: To your right after riding the elevator to the top.

477904.Title: Shakra - Deep Docks
477904.Description:
**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosaries
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries

477907.Title: Lost Flea
477907.Description: In the corner of an area fill with lavafalls. Time your jumps carefully to avoid damage.

477908.Title: Rosary
477908.Description: On a platform above the magma. Jump constantly to avoid damage, and watch out for a falling rock when you finally reach it.

477910.Title: Locked Gate
477910.Description:
Opens when you hit a lever on the eastern side.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

477913.Title: Locked Gate
477913.Description: Opens from the eastern side, after defeating the [Skarrgard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477962) and progressing through the majority of the Hunter's March area.

477914.Title: Frayed Rosary String
477914.Description: At the top of a secret room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478281). Be ready to fight some more flying enemies.

477915.Title: Swift Step
477915.Description:
**Effect:** Sprint at blinding speed, beyond one's natural limits.

_Tip: You can press the sprint button while in the air to gain distance quickly._

477916.Title: Lost Flea
477916.Description:
Pull a [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478284) down below, and swift step your way up towards it.

**Required:** [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915)

477917.Title: Sting Shard
477917.Description:
Can be purchased from [Forge Daughter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476912) for 140 Rosaries + 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)

**Effect:** Stabbing trap

477918.Title: Magma Bell
477918.Description:
Can be purchased from [Forge Daughter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476912) for 110 Rosaries, 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)

**Effect:** Reduces the damage taken from flame and magma

477919.Title: Crafting Kit Upgrade
477919.Description:
Can be purchased from [Forge Daughter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476912) for 180 Rosaries

**Effect:** Increases tool damage

_Fully upgrading your crafting kit is a requirement for 100% completion._

477920.Title: Shard Bundle
477920.Description: Can be purchased from [Forge Daughter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476912) for 50 Rosaries

477921.Title: Rosary
477921.Description: Dangling from the ceiling in the dark. Jump to reach it.

477922.Title: Rosary
477922.Description: Dangling from the ceiling in the dark. Jump to reach it.

477923.Title: Shell Shards
477923.Description: In a guarded chest at the edge of the dark corridor.

477924.Title: Shell Shards
477924.Description: Two nodes stick out of the magma, side-by-side.

477926.Title: Spool Fragment
477926.Description: On a ledge reached by whacking the [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478275) at the edge of the magma-filled room. Keep jumping to avoid damage.

477927.Title: Shell Shards
477927.Description: On a ledge above lava and some corpses.

477928.Title: Rosary Chest
477928.Description:
Inside a chest in the [secret room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477930), reached by hugging the left wall while falling down the pit.

Guarded by two flying enemies.

477929.Title: Shakra - Far Fields
477929.Description:
**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) Map - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosaries
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries

477930.Title: Breakable Wall
477930.Description: Hug the left wall while falling down the pit, then slash through the vines from the eastern side.

477934.Title: Shortcut
477934.Description: In a secret room to the right of the [Bellway - Far Fields](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477933). Hit an explosive rock, then use the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) and [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189) to reach a room up above.

477937.Title: Craftmetal
477937.Description: Inside a chest behind the blockade. Whack it, or get one of the nearby enemies' explosive projectiles to clear it.

477938.Title: Breakable Wall
477938.Description: Leads to a secret room. Watch out for spikes and falling rocks once you're inside.

477939.Title: Rosary
477939.Description: On top of a platform guarded by a Skarr Stalker.

477940.Title: Lost Flea
477940.Description: Watch out for a pressure plate as you approach - it will set off a trap.

477941.Title: Rosary
477941.Description: In a dark corner, guarded by a Skarr Scout.

477943.Title: Lore Tablet
477943.Description:
_-ilgrim_

_You who have held tight to faith have been carried far._

_This station shall offer brief rest to those devout._

477945.Title: Locked Gate
477945.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever on the ceiling behind it. To reach it, you'll need to win a nearby [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479545) and drop through the floor.

477946.Title: Mort
477946.Description:
Inside the building where you find the [Bench - Pilgrim's Rest](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476889)

**Store:**
- [Weighted Belt](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477947) - 160 Rosaries 
    - Moves [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480174) in Act 3
- [Tool Pouch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477950) - 220 Rosaries
- [Memory Locket](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477953) - 150 Rosaries
- [Rosary String](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477954) - 80 Rosaries

477947.Title: Weighted Belt
477947.Description:
Can be purchased from [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946) for 160 Rosaries

**Effect:** Gives you more time to recover after taking damage and reduces knockback

477950.Title: Tool Pouch Upgrade
477950.Description:
Can be purchased from [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946) for 220 Rosaries

**Effect:** Increases the capacity for Tools and Shell Shards that can be carried

_Fully upgrading your tool pouch is a requirement for 100% completion._

477952.Title: Breakable Wall
477952.Description: Leads to a secret room. Watch out for spikes and spiky enemies inside.

477953.Title: Memory Locket
477953.Description:
Can be purchased from [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946) for 150 Rosaries.

In Act 3, it is sold by [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) instead.

477954.Title: Rosary String
477954.Description: Can be purchased from [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946) for 80 Rosaries

477960.Title: Seamstress
477960.Description:
Inside the hot air balloon suspended in the middle of the room.

Speak to her to receive the [Flexile Spines](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477964) Wish.

477961.Title: Breakable Wall
477961.Description: Jump and attack from the eastern side.

477962.Title: Skarrgard
477962.Description:
Defeat 2 to complete the hunter's notes.

**Reward:**
- Access to Hunter's March

477964.Title: Flexile Spines
477964.Description:
[Seamstress](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477960)

**Hunt**

**Reward:**
- [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971)

_Tip: Hit the [Hoker](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479570) enemies in the eastern area to make them shoot spikes. Hitting the spikes spawns a Spine Core, and the enemies regenerate their spikes after a few seconds._

477966.Title: Lever
477966.Description: On the ceiling. Drops a box that creates a shortcut in the room below.

477967.Title: Rosary
477967.Description: Dangling on the ceiling above a ledge.

477969.Title: Rosary
477969.Description: In a small nook, reached by smashing [the ribs above](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478326) or using the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) to float up from the currents below.

477970.Title: Sherma
477970.Description: Appears after encountering the beast and resting at a bench. Disappears after collecting the [Silkspear](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477871).

477971.Title: Drifter's Cloak
477971.Description:
Complete [Flexile Spines](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477964) Wish

**Effect:** Ride strong winds and Glide

477978.Title: Fourth Chorus
477978.Description:
Wakes up to fight you after receiving the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971). Focus on its head (the only part that takes damage!)

_Tip: Once the updrafts appear, float up with the cloak to hit two explosive rocks and dislodge a boulder that instantly ends the battle!_

**Reward:**
- [Servant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478334)

477982.Title: Shard Bundle
477982.Description: On a ledge at the bottom of the lava pit.

477983.Title: Lever
477983.Description: Temporarily creates a passage to the other side of the room. Reached by getting through this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=481180) and hitting the lever on the other side.

477984.Title: Lever
477984.Description: Temporarily creates a passage to the other side of the room. Reached by getting through this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=481180).

477985.Title: Shell Shards
477985.Description: On a ledge beneath the room's eastern exit.

477986.Title: Flintslate
477986.Description: **Effect:** Sharpening slate made from cut and polished Flintgem. Temporarily super-heats the needle's blade, imbuing each slash with flame and increasing leathality.

477988.Title: Rosary
477988.Description: In a room entered from the west.

477990.Title: Secret Room
477990.Description: Hit the glowing orange orb to reveal it, then stand back - it explodes!

477993.Title: Rosary
477993.Description: At the end of a tunnel in the [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477995). Jump and diagonal-slash the red fruit to get over the spikes.

477994.Title: Rosary Chest
477994.Description: At the end of a tunnel in the [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477995). Jump and diagonal-slash the red fruit to get over the spikes.

477997.Title: Rosary
477997.Description: In a small room connected to The Marrow.

477998.Title: Shell Shards
477998.Description: In a small room just above the corridor. Jump to reach it.

477999.Title: Lost Flea
477999.Description: At the top of a long series of red fruit. Watch out for flying enemies.

478001.Title: Rosary Necklace
478001.Description: On a string reached by bouncing on some red fruit.

478003.Title: Shakra - Hunter's March
478003.Description:
Acts as a merchant after dealing with the enemy ambush. If she's not here, try [this location.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479060)

**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Hunter's March Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479518) - 70 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosary
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries

478004.Title: Lever
478004.Description: On the ceiling. Hit it to create platforms throughout the room below.

478009.Title: Secret Room
478009.Description: Walk through the wall to get inside.

478013.Title: Gilly
478013.Description: Attack the bush near the statue to reveal her.

478015.Title: Rosary
478015.Description: In a small room at the top of the area.

478016.Title: Pale Rosary Necklace
478016.Description:
In a small room at the top of the area.

340 Rosaries

478017.Title: Memory Locket
478017.Description: In a cage at the end of the spiky corridor. Break the cage to loot it.

478020.Title: Crest of Beast
478020.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Chapel of the Beast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478018)

**Slots:**
- 1 Silk Skill
- 2 Red
- 2 Yellow

478025.Title: Flea Brew
478025.Description:
Complete [The Lost Fleas](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477857) Wish and talk to [Grishkin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478023)

**Effect:** Temporarily increases the speed of movement and attacks

478026.Title: Varga - Greymoor
478026.Description: Inside one of the Flea Caravan's carriages.

478027.Title: Lore Tablet
478027.Description:
_Pilgrim_

_This settlement welcomes all who step the holy path._

_May you ease your shell within, that your strength renewed can carry you higher._

478029.Title: Bellway - Bellhart
478029.Description:
In the basement of the building.

**Required:** Pay 60 Rosary toll

478032.Title: Temporary Bench - Flea Caravan
478032.Description: Only appears when the Flea Caravan moves here (triggered by finding five Lost Fleas and speaking to [Fleamaster Mooshka](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477856).)

478034.Title: Lore
478034.Description:
_Litany of the Worker_

_May we catch the dregs and never tire,_

_May we clean the dregs and never hunger,_

_May we spool the dregs and never falter._

478036.Title: Rosary
478036.Description: On the ceiling in a room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479691).

478039.Title: Memory Locket
478039.Description:
Inside the Halfway Home, on a ledge in the north-western corner.

**Required:** [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103)

478040.Title: Creige
478040.Description: Behind the counter in the Halfway Home. Sells drinks for 10 Rosaries each.

478043.Title: Hunter's Journal
478043.Description:
[Bugs of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478042) Wish

**Reward:**
- [Hunter's Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479635)

478044.Title: Pilgrim Bellbearer
478044.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478056.Title: Rosary
478056.Description: At the highest point of the flooded room.

478057.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478057.Description: Held by a corpse on a ledge above the water.

478058.Title: Threefold Pin
478058.Description:
In the [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478651), entered by walking through the wall.

**Effect:** Set of throwing blades

478061.Title: Thread Storm
478061.Description: **Effect:** Attack by whipping a storm of Silk around

478063.Title: Bench - Greymoor
478063.Description:
Appears after whacking a lever that rings a bell.

_Tip: Leave and re-enter the room to skip the bell animation._

478078.Title: Rosary
478078.Description: In a boobytrapped room high above the settlement, reached by dropping through the [Locked Trapdoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477865) and following the path. Once you reach the [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478344), continue to the right.

478080.Title: Spool Fragment
478080.Description: In a boobytrapped room high above the settlement, reached by dropping through the [Locked Trapdoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477865) and following the path. Once you reach the [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478344), continue to the right - and watch out for boobytraps.

478082.Title: Lift
478082.Description: Press a button in the room near the [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478080) to get back to the room above it.

478088.Title: Craggler
478088.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

478091.Title: Mask Shard
478091.Description: Behind a [breakable wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479708) at the water's edge.

478092.Title: Rosary
478092.Description: In a secret room that's easiest to reach when using the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) and floating down from above.

478093.Title: Weaver Effigy
478093.Description: In a secret room that's easiest to reach when using the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) and floating down from above.

478136.Title: Skull Tyrant
478136.Description:
Whack the large skull to begin the fight.

[The Terrible Tyrant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478223) Wish

**Reward:**
- [Crown Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478244)

478138.Title: Widow
478138.Description:
**Note:** A [creepy Easter Egg](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479692) can only be activated _before_ killing Widow.

**Reward:** [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) Silk Skill

478139.Title: Rosary
478139.Description: At the bottom of a long vertical corridor.

478140.Title: Rosary
478140.Description: **Required:** [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915) - jump and dash in the air to reach the cages and cross the gap.

478141.Title: Mossberry
478141.Description:
Held by a flying enemy high above the settlement. Make sure the [Lift](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478354) is active in case you fall. May move further to the east in Act 3.

_Tip: Use [Silkspear](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477871) to one-shot the pest!_

_Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

478142.Title: Bone Scroll
478142.Description: Held by a corpse found when swimming all the way to the right in the [secret room.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478666)

478143.Title: Locked Door
478143.Description: Opens when a lever on the eastern side is whacked.

478144.Title: Rosary
478144.Description: On the right side of the room where you get the [Thread Storm](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478061) ability.

478147.Title: Locked Door
478147.Description:
Opens when you slice through vines on the western side.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189), or a Simple Key to open this [Locked Door](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478090) and drop down from above.

478150.Title: Silk Snipper
478150.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

478151.Title: Rosary
478151.Description: On a ledge next to the first spiky wheel.

478153.Title: Rosary
478153.Description: On a platform underneath the corridor.

478154.Title: Locked Gate
478154.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever on top of it.

478156.Title: Crest of Reaper
478156.Description:
**Required:** Defeat the ambush in the [Chapel of the Reaper](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478155) and climb to the top.

**Slots:**
- 1 Silk Skill
- 2 Red
- 2 Blue
- 2 Yellow

478157.Title: Lore Tablet
478157.Description:
_Pilgrim_

_This settlement welcomes all who step the holy path._

_May you ease your shell within, that your strength renewed can carry you higher._

478158.Title: Longpin
478158.Description:
In a secret room behind a Wood Wasp nest.

**Effect:** Pierces tough shells

478159.Title: Pond Skipper
478159.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

478160.Title: Wood Wasp
478160.Description:
Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Note: Will spawn infinitely if their nest is not destroyed._

478161.Title: Pondcatcher
478161.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

478162.Title: Locked Gate
478162.Description: Opens when you stand on a button on the western side, reached via [Elevator](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478982).

478164.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478164.Description: On a small platform above the water.

478168.Title: Phacia
478168.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

478169.Title: Splinterhorn
478169.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478170.Title: Bench - Shellwood
478170.Description:
Directly above an [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479694).

**Required:** Pay 40 Rosary toll

478172.Title: Greyroot
478172.Description:
Inside the building. Speak to it twice to begin the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish.

Speak to it again after finding the [Twisted Bud](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478783) to begin the [Rite of Rebirth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792) Wish.

478173.Title: Rite of the Pollip
478173.Description:
Speak to [Greyroot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478172), found inside the building.

**Gather**
- [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478166)
- [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478174)
- [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478180)
- [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478187)
- [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478192)
- [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478198)

**Reward:**
- [Pollip Pouch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478294) Trinket

478174.Title: Pollip Heart
478174.Description:
On a high-up platform in the north-east corner.

_Part of the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish._

478175.Title: Pollenica
478175.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478176.Title: Lost Flea
478176.Description: At the bottom of a pit filled with Pollenica (and a few Phacia) enemies

478177.Title: Mask Shard
478177.Description:
At the end of the platforming challenge in the room behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478969).

_Note: Taking it spawns a few Phacia enemies throughout the room._

478180.Title: Pollip Heart
478180.Description:
Bounce off the flowers and hit the large purple plant to collect it.

_Part of the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish._

478181.Title: Gahlia
478181.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

478182.Title: Rosary String
478182.Description: On a ledge in front of a Gahlia enemy.

478183.Title: Passage
478183.Description: Behind a Gahlia, accessed by attacking from the eastern side.

478184.Title: Breakable Wall
478184.Description:
Three breakable walls in rapid succession.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478186.Title: Splinterbark
478186.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478187.Title: Pollip Heart
478187.Description:
In a nook at the edge of the room. Easiest to reach when you drop down from above.

_Part of the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish._

478188.Title: Rosary
478188.Description: On a ledge beneath a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478972). Drop down from above to reach it.

478190.Title: Rosary
478190.Description:
In a small nook at the top of the room.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478191.Title: Shell Shards
478191.Description:
On the ceiling right above a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479696).

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478192.Title: Pollip Heart
478192.Description:
Behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479696). Smash through a Wood Wasp nest, drop down a hole, and move to the right to find it.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

_Part of the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish._

478193.Title: Lost Flea
478193.Description:
After breaking through a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479698), climb to the top and make your way left. The flea is at the end of the corridor.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478194.Title: Furm
478194.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

478195.Title: Winged Furm
478195.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

478196.Title: Rosary
478196.Description: Behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479052) in the bell maze.

478197.Title: Rosary
478197.Description:
Behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479051) in the bell maze.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478198.Title: Pollip Heart
478198.Description:
Behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479050).

_Part of the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish._

478199.Title: Needolin
478199.Description:
**Required:**  Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138)

**Effect:** Play songs that can open special Needolin Doors, reveal secret lore, and make enemies / NPCs sing.

478201.Title: Bench - Bellhart
478201.Description: After defeating [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138), whack a lever to ring a bell and reveal the bench.

478203.Title: Frey
478203.Description:
**Required:** Complete [The Threadspun Town](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478028) Objective

**Store:**
- [Memory Locket ](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478204)- 330 Rosaries
- Rosary Necklace - 140 Rosaries

_After completing [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207):_
- [Multibinder](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478345) - 880 Rosaries
- [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478347) - 270 Rosaries
- Shard Bundle - 50 Rosaries

_After acquiring your own [Bellhome](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479171):_
- Desk - 380 Rosaries
- Gleamlights - 320 Rosaries
- Bell Lacquer - 520 Rosaries
- Personal Spa - 1100 Rosaries
- Gramophone - 490 Rosaries (after giving all Psalm Cylinders to [Vaultkeeper Cardinius](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478640))

478204.Title: Memory Locket
478204.Description: Can be purchased from [Frey](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478203) for 330 Rosaries

478206.Title: Silver Bells
478206.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138) to find it on the notice board.

**Gather**

**Reward:**
- Rosary Necklace

478207.Title: My Missing Courier
478207.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138) to find it on the notice board.

**Wayfarer**  

[Courier Tipp](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478297)

**Reward:**
- [Frey](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478203)'s stock expands

478208.Title: Crawbug Clearing
478208.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138) to find it on the notice board.

**Hunt**

**Reward:**
- [Crafting Kit Upgrade](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478348)

_Tip: Two Craws spawn on the roof of the [halfway home](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478040). Leaving and re-entering the building respawns them, even without resting at a bench._

478209.Title: Relic Seeker Scrounge
478209.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138) and enter a building above [Frey's shop.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478203)

**Buys Collectibles:**
- Bone Scroll - 90 Rosaries
- Choral Commandment - 90 Rosaries
- Weaver Effigy - 240 Rosaries
- Rune Harp - 110 Rosaries
- Arcane Egg - 250 Rosaries

478210.Title: Pinmaster Plinney
478210.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138) and enter the building above [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209).

Provider of [Weapon Upgrades](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480827).

478211.Title: Pinmaster's Oil
478211.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138), and speak to [Pinmaster Plinney](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478210) after having your needle sharpened for the first time.

[Pale Oil](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478668) Location

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- Shining Needle upgrade

478213.Title: Bone Scroll
478213.Description:
**Required:** [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971)

_Signed parchment containing a pilgrim’s scrawl._  

_"My dear companions, all are gone now, devoured, scorched, fallen to exhaustion, or even worse seduced by the Haunting."_

478215.Title: Servitor Ignim
478215.Description:
On the ceiling above the bench.

Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

478216.Title: Silkspeed Anklets
478216.Description:
**Required:** [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199), [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915) - dash across the room to reveal it.

**Effect:** Increases sprinting speed, consumes Silk

478217.Title: Rosary String
478217.Description: In a secret room reached by hugging the right wall as you fall into the lava pit.

478218.Title: Rosary
478218.Description: On a ledge reached by riding an air current.

478219.Title: Lost Flea
478219.Description:
**Required:** [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) and [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189).

The path toward it begins [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477934).

478220.Title: A Lifesaving Bridge
478220.Description:
Appears on the board as soon as you reach Greymoor for the first time.

**Donate:** 300 Shell Shards

**Reward:**
- A bridge is built over the hole to the west. Don't hit it, or it will break.

478221.Title: Volatile Flintbeetles
478221.Description:
Appears on the board as soon as you reach Greymoor for the first time.

**Hunt**
- [Flintgem](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478247)
- [Flintgem](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478249)
- [Flintgem](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478250)

**Reward:**
- [Memory Locket](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478222)

478223.Title: The Terrible Tyrant
478223.Description:
Appears on the board after getting [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

**Grand Hunt**

[Skull Tyrant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478136)

**Reward:**
- Heavy Rosary Necklace

478224.Title: Marrowmaw
478224.Description: Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

478225.Title: Beast Shard
478225.Description:
Defeat [Marrowmaw](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478224) in a secret room

140 Shell Shards

478227.Title: Weavenest Atla Map
478227.Description: **Required:** Open [Needolin Door](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476902) to this area, then hit two glowing cylinders at the end of the corridor.

478228.Title: Eva
478228.Description: At the end of a hidden passage behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479063).

478229.Title: Crest of Hunter Upgrade 1
478229.Description:
**Required:** Speak to [Eva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228) and allow the Insight.

**Effect:** Hitting enemies generates Focus. Fill the focus bar to deal more damage.

**Slots:**
- 2 Red
- 2 Blue
- 2 Yellow

478230.Title: Spool Fragment
478230.Description:
**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

_Tip: To reach this room, jump up the wall above this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479063)._

478232.Title: Pharlid Diver
478232.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478233.Title: Mask Shard
478233.Description:
On a high-up ledge in a room filled with lava.

**Required:** [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199)

478234.Title: Lore
478234.Description:
_This low, her gaze escaped._

_Prepare, sisters. Weave hope anew._

_That we might break free this accursed web born of our naive foundation._

478237.Title: Mossberry
478237.Description:
Held by an enemy flying high above this area.

_Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

478238.Title: Rosary
478238.Description: On a grave at the edge of the area.

478240.Title: Crest of Wanderer
478240.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Chapel of the Wanderer](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478239)

**Slots:**
- 1 Silk Skill
- 1 Red
- 2 Blue
- 3 Yellow

478241.Title: Lore Tablet
478241.Description:
_Pilgrim_

_You are blessed to walk the foundations of Pharloom._

_Humble yourself before the shells of those who gave their lives to hold our kingdom's weight._

478242.Title: Rosary
478242.Description:
At the top of a passage behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479714). Watch out for falling rocks.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478243.Title: Rosary
478243.Description:
At the end of a secret passage behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479716).

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478244.Title: Crown Fragment
478244.Description:
Dropped by [Skull Tyrant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478136).

Gathered as part of [The Terrible Tyrant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478223) Wish

478247.Title: Flintgem
478247.Description: Dropped by a Flintbeetle, which only spawns here after beginning the [Volatile Flintbeetles](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478221) Wish.

478248.Title: Flintbeetle
478248.Description:
Defeat 3 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Note: Only spawns after beginning the [Volatile Flintbeetles](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478221) Wish._

478249.Title: Flintgem
478249.Description: Dropped by a Flintbeetle, which only spawns here after beginning the [Volatile Flintbeetles](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478221) Wish.

478250.Title: Flintgem
478250.Description: Dropped by a Flintbeetle, which only spawns here after beginning the [Volatile Flintbeetles](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478221) Wish.

478251.Title: Loddie
478251.Description:
Appears here after defeating [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138), and disappears after starting Act 3.

Strike the target 15 times and get [Tool Pouch Upgrade](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478252), and 25 times for [Heavy Rosary Necklace](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479326).

478252.Title: Tool Pouch Upgrade
478252.Description:
Complete [Loddie's](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478251) first challenge by hitting the target 15 times, or find it here in [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260).

**Effect:** Increases the capacity for Tools and Shell Shards that can be carried

_Fully upgrading your tool pouch is a requirement for 100% completion._

478253.Title: Lore Tablet
478253.Description:
_Weaver of Pharloom._

_By grace you warded. By thread you healed._

_For your favour, eternal, we offer our song._

478255.Title: Druid's Eye
478255.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish

**Effect:** Upon taking damage, silk is formed

478256.Title: Lever
478256.Description: On an isolated ledge. Whack it to lift the hanging platform nearby.

478257.Title: Locked Gate
478257.Description: Unlocked by a lever on the eastern side, next to the [Bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476888).

478259.Title: Shard Bundle
478259.Description:
Guarded by a Silk Snipper.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189) (or you can bounce off the enemies' heads)

478260.Title: Shard Bundle
478260.Description: On a high-up ledge in the flooded room. Bounce off the flying enemy to reach it.

478261.Title: Roachcatcher
478261.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

478262.Title: Rosary
478262.Description:
On a ledge above the bridge.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478264.Title: Muckroach
478264.Description:
Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

Drop Roach Guts, required for [Roach Guts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478356) Wish.

478265.Title: Bench - Sinner's Road
478265.Description: Activates when you defeat the two [Muckroach](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478264) nearby.

478266.Title: Styx
478266.Description: Appears when you defeat the two [Muckroach](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478264) nearby.

478268.Title: Yarnaby
478268.Description:
Appears when you call out to the bellhome with a 'worthy specimen' after [Rite of Rebirth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792) Wish


[Infestation Operation](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478814) Wish

478271.Title: Kratt
478271.Description: Stuck in a web at the end of the [secret room.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478270) Joins the Flea Caravan wherever they are currently based after a brief chat.

478273.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478273.Description: Inside a cage, entered from the [eastern side.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478688)

478274.Title: Shakra - Sinner's Road
478274.Description:
**Store:**

- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Hunter's March Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479518) - 70 Rosaries
- [Greymoor Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479527) - 70 Rosaries
- [Bellhart Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479529) - 40 Rosaries
- [Shellwood Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479530) - 70 Rosaries
- [Sinner's Road Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479526) - 90 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosary
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries

478275.Title: Lever
478275.Description: In the north-eastern corner of the magma-filled room. Jump constantly to avoid damage, and whack the lever so it rearranges the platforms (allowing you to reach the [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477926))

478277.Title: Rosary
478277.Description: After activating the nearby [Bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478276), bounce off the bells on top of it and use the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) to float over to the right. When you get close, use [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915) to close the gap.

478278.Title: Rooted Cogs
478278.Description: At the end of a secret area behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478994). Required to open up [Bench - Sinner's Road](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478276)

478279.Title: Lever
478279.Description: On a ledge at the upper edge of the room. Raises the platform next to it.

478281.Title: Breakable Wall
478281.Description: Next to a small ledge near the spikes. Leads to a secret room and a  [Frayed Rosary String](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477914).

478282.Title: Lore Tablet
478282.Description:
_On the eighth harvest, send:_

_Fifty measures, nine beats dregthread, spooled,_

_Fourteen measures dregthread, twined,_

_Oath of fealty, all workers._

_On the twelfth harvest, send:_

_Forty measures dregthread, spooled,_

_Two beats fine thread, twined,_

_Oath of fealty, all workers._

478283.Title: Silkeater
478283.Description: At the very top of the tower. Hit this [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480435) a few times and use the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) to reach it.

478284.Title: Lever
478284.Description: On a high-up ledge, reached with the help of [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915). Lowers a platform used to reach the [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477916) up above.

478286.Title: Rosary
478286.Description: In an enclosed room above the bouncy balloons.

478287.Title: Lost Flea
478287.Description: Reached through the top of the tower.

478288.Title: Kratt - Greymoor
478288.Description:
**Required:** Save [Kratt](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478271)

Give him 10 Rosaries to enter the spa and gradually have your Silk restored. 

_Tip: Once inside, hit him when he peeks and he'll start letting you use his spa for free._

478291.Title: Restoration of Bellhart
478291.Description:
Appears on the notice board after defeating [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138), giving [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209) any relic, and speaking to [Pinmaster Plinney](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478210) to receive your first damage upgrade.

**Donation**
- 250 Rosaries

**Reward:**
- [Bellhart's Glory](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478797) Wish will appear some time later

478293.Title: Lever
478293.Description: In a secret room next to the [TRAPPED Bench - Hunter's March](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476886). Makes the bench safe to sit on.

478294.Title: Pollip Pouch
478294.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish

**Effect:** Applies venom to equipped Tools

478295.Title: Rosary String Dispenser
478295.Description: Costs 80 Rosaries to make a single Rosary String (60 Rosaries)

478297.Title: Courier Tipp
478297.Description: Only appears here after beginning the [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207) Wish.

478298.Title: Lore Tablet
478298.Description:
_Pilgrim_

_Spare a song for those who lay here silent._

_By strength abandoned they fell before the final ascent._

478300.Title: Covetous Pilgrim
478300.Description:
Defeat 2 to complete the hunter's notes.

Does not respawn, but is also found [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480194) and [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480387).

478301.Title: Winged Pilgrim Bellbearer
478301.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478302.Title: Bench - Shellwood
478302.Description:
Appears after ringing a bell.

_Tip: Leave and re-enter the room to skip the bell animation._

478303.Title: Shard Bundle
478303.Description: In a secret room north-west of the elevator.

478304.Title: Lore Tablet
478304.Description:
_Pilgrim_

_Accept the judgement of the rise beyond,_

_That all who stand at Pharloom's holy crest prove pure of will and want._

478306.Title: Driznit
478306.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

478307.Title: Shakra - Blasted Steps
478307.Description:
**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Hunter's March Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479518) - 70 Rosaries
- [Greymoor Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479527) - 70 Rosaries
- [Bellhart Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479529) - 40 Rosaries
- [Shellwood Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479530) - 70 Rosaries
- [Sinner's Road Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479526) - 90 Rosaries
- [Blasted Steps Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479673) - 70 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosary
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries

478311.Title: Pharloom's Welcome
478311.Description:
Defeat [Lace](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476915) in the Deep Docks

**Warning:** This achievement is **missable** if you go to Blasted Steps or Sinner's Road via the Wormways, or move the Flea Caravan to Greymoor without fighting Lace here first.

478312.Title: Breakable Wall
478312.Description: Attack from either side to open a path.

478313.Title: Couriers Tipp & Pill
478313.Description:
**Required:**
- [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207) Wish
- [My Missing Brother](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478798) Wish


**Delivery Wishes:**
- Bone Bottom Supplies (Repeatable)
- Pilgrim's Rest Supplies (Repeatable)
- Songclave Supplies (Repeatable)
- Fleatopia Supplies (Repeatable)
- [Queen's Egg](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479177)
- [Liquid Lacquer](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479199)

478314.Title: Silver Bell
478314.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478315.Title: Silver Bell
478315.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478316.Title: Passage
478316.Description: In the right corner of the [Bellway station](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478029)

478317.Title: Silver Bell
478317.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478319.Title: Silver Bell
478319.Description:
In a small nook next to a vertical drop.

Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478322.Title: Silver Bell
478322.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478324.Title: Silver Bell
478324.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478325.Title: Shell Shards
478325.Description: Behind an explosive wall, reached by smashing [the ribs above.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478326)

478326.Title: Breakable Floor
478326.Description: Hit the explosive ball above to break it.

478327.Title: Silver Bell
478327.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478329.Title: Silver Bell
478329.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

478330.Title: Shakra - Wormways
478330.Description:
**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries

- [Greymoor Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479527) - 70 Rosaries
- [Bellhart Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479529) - 40 Rosaries
- [Shellwood Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479530) - 70 Rosaries

- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries

478331.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478331.Description: Opened by a lever above it.

478332.Title: Breakable Wall
478332.Description: Can be opened from the western side (in the Wormways region).

478338.Title: Roachfeeder
478338.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

478341.Title: Barbed Bracelet
478341.Description: **Effect:** Increases damage taken, but also increases damage dealt by the needle

478344.Title: Lever
478344.Description:
On the ceiling in an area reached by dropping through the [Locked Trapdoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477865), then proceeding to the left (and down).

Activates a nearby elevator.

478345.Title: Multibinder
478345.Description:
**Required:** Complete [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207)

 Can be purchased from [Frey](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478203) for 880 Rosaries

**Effect:** Extends the act of binding, but increases its healing effect

478346.Title: Breakable Wall
478346.Description: On the lower half of the boobytrapped room, beneath the [Rosary](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478078).

478347.Title: Spool Fragment
478347.Description:
**Required:** Complete [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207)

Can be purchased from [Frey](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478203) for 270 Rosaries

478348.Title: Crafting Kit Upgrade
478348.Description:
Complete [Crawbug Clearing](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478208) Wish

**Effect:** Increases tool damage

_Fully upgrading your crafting kit is a requirement for 100% completion._

478349.Title: Rosary
478349.Description: Drop into the cage from above to collect them.

478350.Title: Locked Gate
478350.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever on its western side.

478351.Title: Locked Gate
478351.Description: Only opens from the eastern side.

478352.Title: Shell Shards
478352.Description: On an out-of-the-way ledge, easiest to reach by dropping down from above.

478353.Title: Locked Gate
478353.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever on a ledge below it, south-east.

478354.Title: Lift
478354.Description: Activated via [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478344). Don't worry if you fall; it can be summoned by a button on the ground below.

478359.Title: Rosary
478359.Description: Stand on a ledge below the cage to collect them.

478360.Title: Lost Flea
478360.Description: Jump over the first cage, then hit the easternmost side of the one holding the flea to set it free.

478365.Title: Tacks
478365.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Roach Guts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478356) Wish

**Effect:** Leaves spikes on the ground, damaging enemies that step on them.

_Note: In Act 3, it will appear on the floor inside the hut._

478366.Title: Shell Shards
478366.Description: On the ceiling above the parasite-infested water.

478367.Title: Wraith
478367.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478368.Title: The Mist
478368.Description:
Use [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) when standing near fireflies, then exit the area in the direction they flew in. Repeat this 5 times to exit for good.

Disappears when [Phantom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478370) is defeated.

478369.Title: Bench - Exhaust Organ
478369.Description: Free of charge! Head up to the left as soon as you enter

478370.Title: Phantom
478370.Description:
In a room at the top of the Exhaust Organ, which acts as an alternative entrance to the Citadel, skipping the [Last Judge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478545) boss.

**Reward:**
- [Cross Stitch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478371) Silk Skill
- [Grey Ghost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479061)

478371.Title: Cross Stitch
478371.Description:
Defeat [Phantom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478370)

**Effect:** Bind Silk around the needle to deflect enemy attacks and instantly strike back

478378.Title: Lost Flea
478378.Description: Inside the Exhaust Organ, there is a room with a silk refill spindle. Go left from there to access it.

478379.Title: Breakable Wall
478379.Description: Right next to the corpse holding a [Shard Bundle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478358).

478382.Title: Bench - Mount Fay
478382.Description: In a side-room near the peak.

478384.Title: Bench - Coral Tower
478384.Description: At the far right side of the Coral Tower's ground floor.

478385.Title: Lost Flea
478385.Description: In a secret area at the top of the room. To reach it, smash through this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480393) and continue left.

478387.Title: Bench - Blasted Steps
478387.Description: Inside the hot air balloon suspended in the air.

478388.Title: Bench - Sands of Karak
478388.Description: Free of charge, and comes with a friend!

478393.Title: Lost Flea
478393.Description:
In a small side-room at the edge of the area.

**Required:** [Key of Indolent](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478467), or enter The Slab through the [shortcut cave](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479019)

478398.Title: Lost Flea
478398.Description: At the end of a platforming challenge.

478402.Title: Lost Flea
478402.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

Hit the box with a long track into its final position to reach this flea.

478404.Title: Lost Flea
478404.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

At the top of a parkour challenge that starts with this [Ring](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478679) before taking you into a [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480499) and beyond. Once you're back in an area where you can see the sky, hug the right wall to begin the climb toward the flea.

478406.Title: Bench - Putrified Ducts
478406.Description: Inside a building on top of the parasite-infested water.

478407.Title: TRAPPED Bench - Bilewater
478407.Description: Sitting down will make you fall into a pit of parasite-infected water.

478408.Title: Lost Flea
478408.Description: At the end of a trap-filled [secret room.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478852)

478409.Title: Bench - Bilewater
478409.Description: Reached through a path starting from this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478853)

478416.Title: Lost Flea
478416.Description: Enter the shaft from [this section](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478891) to turn on a fan, and [this section](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478892) to ride the air current to the top.

478418.Title: Bench - Underworks
478418.Description: **Required:** Pay 15 Rosary toll FOR EACH USE

478419.Title: Lost Flea
478419.Description: Can be collected only by passing through [Wisp Thicket area](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478337) and traversing a room full of saws.

478428.Title: Bench - Cogwork Core
478428.Description: In a side-room. Hit the wheel on the ceiling multiple times to create it.

478430.Title: Bench - Underworks
478430.Description: **Required:** Pay 15 Rosary toll FOR EACH USE

478437.Title: Lost Flea
478437.Description:
In a room that can only be reached after defeating a nearby [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479376).

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

478439.Title: Bench - Far Fields
478439.Description: In a room at the edge of the area.

478440.Title: Moss Mother x2
478440.Description:
The second Moss Mother will join the fight when the first is near death.

**Reward:**
- [Weavelight](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479070)

478443.Title: Lost Flea
478443.Description: In a room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478459). Defeat the two Snitchflies to rescue it.

478450.Title: Lost Flea
478450.Description: Carried by an Aknid flying around the room, entered via [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478495).

478453.Title: Moorwing
478453.Description:
May be skipped if you travel here with the flea caravan.

**Reward:**
- None

If missed here, it may appear in this [second location](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479149)

478457.Title: Ruined Tool
478457.Description: Can be restored by [Forge Daughter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476912), [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723), or by yourself near [this bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478382) on Mount Fay.

478458.Title: Lore Tablet
478458.Description:
_Sister, spider, sat between salt and stone,_

_Build those tools of brilliant mind imagined,_

_Aid us when our Silk has waned._

478460.Title: Captured
478460.Description: If the Wardenfly here catches you in its cage, you will be sent [HERE](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478462)

478462.Title: Captured Location
