478462.Description: You'll wake up in a cage here after being captured by a cage-carrying enemy in the [Bilewater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478460), [Deep Docks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479366), or [Greymoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480192) regions.

478465.Title: Grindle
478465.Description: Moves next to a nearby [Bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478394) after a brief chat through the door.

478467.Title: Key of Indolent
478467.Description: At the edge of a room entered from above.

478468.Title: Slab Map
478468.Description: At the end of a secret passage next to the bench.

478471.Title: Shell Shards
478471.Description: At the top of a vertical climb in the room behind the  [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479002)

478472.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478472.Description: Held by a corpse in the room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479002)

478474.Title: Key of Heretic
478474.Description: Dropped by the final enemy in a room entered from above.

478475.Title: Spool Fragment
478475.Description:
At the top of a frosty area.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478476.Title: Shard Bundle
478476.Description: In a hanging decoration at the western edge of the area. Guarded by a Guardfly.

478477.Title: Shell Shards
478477.Description: At the far right side of the dark corridor.

478480.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478480.Description:
In a nook at the very top of the area.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

478481.Title: Alchemist Zylotol
478481.Description:
In an area that can only be reached via [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189).

Speak to him twice to begin the [Alchemist's Assistant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478482) Wish

478482.Title: Alchemist's Assistant
478482.Description:
Begun when you speak to [Alchemist Zylotol](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478481) twice.

**Reward:**
- [Plasmium Phial](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478496)

478486.Title: Plasmium
478486.Description:
In a side-section of the tunnel, reached by dropping from above.

Part of the [Alchemist's Assistant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478482) Wish. To gather, equip the Needle Phial and fully charge an attack with it.

478488.Title: Plasmium
478488.Description: Part of the [Alchemist's Assistant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478482) Wish. To gather, equip the Needle Phial and fully charge an attack with it.

478490.Title: Plasmium
478490.Description: Part of the [Alchemist's Assistant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478482) Wish. To gather, equip the Needle Phial and fully charge an attack with it.

478492.Title: Needolin Lore
478492.Description:
Use the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) to see the final thoughts of Alchemist Zylotol's first assistant.

_The buds must grow..._

_Only a little... Only a spark..._

_To our dead lands... life..._

_Too dark..._

478493.Title: Memory Locket
478493.Description: Held by a corpse at the very end of the tunnels.

478496.Title: Plasmium Phial
478496.Description:
Complete [Alchemist's Assistant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478482) Wish

**Effect:** Grants a temporary health boost that disappears upon sitting on a bench, just like Lifeblood

_Tip: With the [Architect Crest](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478745), this can be used to get 9 Plasmium Masks at once which triggers Plasmium Overdose, a state wherein you get passive health regeneration, granting essentially infinite health. This resets after dying, sitting on a bench, and fast traveling._

478498.Title: Mask Shard
478498.Description:
**Required:** [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288), or:
- [Swift Step](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477915) from the platform in the first screenshot above
- [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714) immediately after
- [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103) to gain a bit more height

478500.Title: Shell Shards
478500.Description: At the edge of a spike pit at the end of a tunnel.

478502.Title: Memory Locket
478502.Description: On a narrow platform above the sand.

478505.Title: Silkeater
478505.Description: Does not appear in Steel Soul mode.

478506.Title: Great Conchflies
478506.Description:
**Reward:**
- None

_Tip: Focus on one of the flies - the fight ends when either of them die._

478516.Title: Lever
478516.Description: On a high-up ledge near the cages. Rearranges their positions.

478519.Title: Lumble The Lucky
478519.Description:
Speak with him to play a game of dice.

After depleting Lumble's rosaries (he starts with 40, you win 4 every time you win), you'll receive his [Magnetite Dice](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479309). It can be looted from his body in Act 2. If not picked up already, they can also be purchased from [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) in Act 3.

_Tip: After rolling the dice for ~5 seconds, the dice glimmer for a few frames. Throwing the dice in this window guarantees a winning roll, wherein Hornet makes a grunt as an indicator. Otherwise, win/lose is up to chance._

478522.Title: Grindle
478522.Description:
**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189) + [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103)

**Store:**
- [Thief's Mark](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478525) - 350 Rosaries
- [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478527) - 680 Rosaries
- [Crafting Kit Upgrade](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478533) - 700 Rosaries
- [Psalm Cylinder](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478530) - 180 Rosaries
- [Snitch Pick](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479201) - 740 Rosaries
- Rosary String - 80 Rosaries
- [Magnetite Dice](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479309) - 300 Rosaries

_In Act 3:_
- [Tool Pouch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480201) - 220 Rosaries
- [Memory Locket](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480202) - 150 Rosaries

478525.Title: Thief's Mark
478525.Description:
Sold by [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) for 350 Rosaries

**Effect:** Enemies drop more Rosaries, but you lose some Rosaries when taking damage

478529.Title: Pinstress
478529.Description:
Inside the hot air balloon suspended in the air.

Train with her to learn the [Needle Strike](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478510) ability.

478533.Title: Crafting Kit Upgrade
478533.Description:
Sold by [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) for 700 Rosaries

**Effect:** Increases tool damage

_Fully upgrading your crafting kit is a requirement for 100% completion._

478535.Title: Lore Tablet
478535.Description:
In a room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478534)

_Bug born of Pharloom. You have been chosen._

_May our Citadel's holy gilding harden your soft shell._

_Stand eternal as our arbiter, that no bug bearing sin shall step within our sacred halls._

478537.Title: Beast Shard
478537.Description: At the upper edge of the room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478534), found by proceeding through the [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478538).

478541.Title: Craftmetal
478541.Description: At the end of a [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478540) filled with worms and falling rocks.

478544.Title: Grand Gate
478544.Description:
_Awaken the old bells throughout the lands._

**Previous Objective:** [The Great Citadel](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477834)

The five bells are linked to benches, namely:
- [Bench - Greymoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478063)
- [Bench - Bellhart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478201)
- [Bench - The Marrow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477887)
- [Bench - Shellwood](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478302)
- [Bench - Deep Docks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476887)
  
**Next Objective:** [Silent Halls](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478547) (Act 2)

478545.Title: Last Judge
478545.Description:
Ring all five bells and play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) in front of the door to begin the fight. If it's proving difficult, you can skip it by fighting [Phantom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478370) instead.

**Reward:**
- [Judge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479084)

478549.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478549.Description: Held by a corpse in a cage.

478552.Title: Breakable Wall
478552.Description: Hit it from the eastern side.

478553.Title: Bone Scroll
478553.Description:
At the end of a tunnel behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478552).

_Filthy rag, marked with the scrawl of an Underworker._

_"So much suffering. Are we truly chosen, or have we sinned unknowing, and now are punished for it?"_

478554.Title: Shell Shards
478554.Description: One level below the tunnel's left entrance.

478556.Title: Breakable Wall
478556.Description: Attack from the eastern side after dealing with the [Undercrank](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479836).

478557.Title: Shard Bundle
478557.Description: At the end of a short tunnel behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478556).

478562.Title: Loam
478562.Description: In a secret room, found by busting through the [Breakable Ceiling](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478560) and climbing up the tunnel.

478565.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478565.Description: At the edge of a side-room. Guarded by an Underworker and Underloft.

478568.Title: Confession Stand
478568.Description:
Insert 25 Rosaries for lore. On the other side, attack some gears to break the machine and receive different dialogue.

_Speak now. Thy confession will be heard._

_**Hornet:** ..._

_You have confessed a sin most grave and must by works cleanse yourself._

_Return to your task and work off-cycle, neither eating nor supping until new-cycle begins._

_By the grace of Pharloom eternal may you never tire. Toil, and be forgiven._

---

Alternative dialogue if the machine is broken on the other side:

_Speak... ... confession..._

_**Hornet:** ..._

_You... ... sin... ... cleanse..._

_Return... ... work... ... begins...._

_... Pharloom... ... never... ... forgiven._

478570.Title: Shell Shards
478570.Description: On a ledge above the benches. Use the [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189) on the left wall to reach it.

478571.Title: Memory Locket
478571.Description: Found by jumping into the [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480046), then dropping down a hole to the left.

478573.Title: Rosary
478573.Description: On a ledge. Watch out for the bursts of steam.

478577.Title: Delver's Drill
478577.Description: **Effect:** Downward drill attack. Deals heavy damage.

478581.Title: Rosary
478581.Description:
At the north-western edge of the maze. To reach it, go directly left of a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479844) and jump over a few traps to reach a regular wall, then use the [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189) to go up into a secret room.

Be ready for a Drapefly to spawn behind you.

478582.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478582.Description: At the top of a platforming challenge behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479844) below.

478586.Title: Spool Fragment
478586.Description:
At the very top of the platforming puzzle in the room below.

_Tip: You can hit the bottom of the platforms to change their positions!_

478587.Title: Shell Shards
478587.Description: At the end of a room unlocked via [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479854).

478588.Title: Rosary
478588.Description: On a ledge just beneath the room's exit.

478593.Title: Lore
478593.Description:
_Great bugs! You who weep as your kingdom fades, join me upon the Stage._

_Together, we shall enflame the passion of Pharloom!_

478595.Title: Silkeater
478595.Description: At the bottom of a spiky pit, guarded by two Snitchflies.

478596.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478596.Description: Can be opened from the Whispering Vaults area after completing a box puzzle in the room to the east.

478597.Title: Silk Machine
478597.Description: Insert 40 Rosaries to replenish some Silk.

478599.Title: White Key
478599.Description:
On a corpse at the edge of the area. Sold by [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) if you don't pick it up before completing [The Wandering Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478634) Wish.

Unlocks the [Locked Elevator](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478590) in Whiteward

478600.Title: Bench - First Shrine
478600.Description:
Appears when you destroy the web covering a bell inside the building, then hit a lever.

_Tip: Leave and re-enter the room to skip the bell animation._

478601.Title: Caretaker
478601.Description: Appears after you ring a bell inside the building.

478602.Title: Mottled Skarr
478602.Description:
At the end of a secret corridor filled with traps and spikes, found by jumping at the leftmost wall near the [Shell Shards](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478007).

**Store:**
- [Curveclaw](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478604) - 140 Rosaries
- [Fractured Mask](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478607) - 260 Rosaries
- Shard Bundle - 50 Rosaries

_Note: Dies of unknown causes later in the game. The Fractured Mask can still be found here afterwards, but the [Curveclaw moves up a floor.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479726)_

478603.Title: Lore Tablet
478603.Description:
_Here is established, by holy consent of the Conductors, The Memorium of Pharloom._

_What Is Remembered Is Never Lost._

478604.Title: Curveclaw
478604.Description:
Sold by [Mottled Skarr](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478602) for 140 Rosaries

**Effect:** Throwing weapon

[ACT 3 Location](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479726)

478607.Title: Fractured Mask
478607.Description:
Sold by [Mottled Skarr](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478602) for 260 Rosaries, or found on the ground here later in the game.

**Effect:** Shields against critical damage, but shatters on impact. Repaired by resting at a bench.

478608.Title: Breakable Floor
478608.Description: Next to the [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477907). Standing on it is enough to break it.

478613.Title: Locked Door
478613.Description: Opens from the eastern side, reached via tricky platforming that's easier after acquiring [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714).

478614.Title: Locked Door
478614.Description: Hit a wheel on the eastern side multiple times to open it.

478615.Title: Mask Shard
478615.Description: At the top of a tunnel reached after an [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479964).

478618.Title: Spool Fragment
478618.Description: In a room at the edge of the tunnels, initially entered [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479975).

478620.Title: Shortcut - Upper Cogwork Core
478620.Description:
Leads to [Upper Cogwork Core](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478623).

Easier to reach after acquiring [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714).

478625.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478625.Description: Opened by a lever on its northern side. If you've opened the [Breakable Floor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479676) below, the air will get you closer to Greymoor.

478626.Title: Lever
478626.Description: Opens the trapdoor next to it for hot air to flow through.

478632.Title: Lever
478632.Description: On a high-up ledge. Whack it to create balloons in the area below.

478634.Title: The Wandering Merchant
478634.Description:
**Wayfarer**

Find [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478866) in the Choral Chambers.

**Reward:**
- [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) appears as a vendor in Songclave

478636.Title: Scared Pilgrim
478636.Description: Appears some time after ringing the bell.

478637.Title: Locked Door
478637.Description: Opens when a lever on the eastern side is whacked.

478638.Title: Bench - Songclave
478638.Description: Appears some time after ringing the bell.

478640.Title: Vaultkeeper Cardinius
478640.Description:
Psalm Cylinders can be played here

**Melodies:**
- [Sacred Cylinder](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479717)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478530)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Vaultkeeper Cardinius Lair](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478650)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Whispering Vaults](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478774)
- [Psalm Cylinder - High Halls](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478908)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Underworks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478929)

478645.Title: Locked Door
478645.Description: Unlocked by a lever on a ledge to its north-east.

478646.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478646.Description: Right beneath the [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478145). Unlocked by a lever on top of it.

478649.Title: Rosary
478649.Description: Above a hole leading toward a [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478145).

478651.Title: Secret Room
478651.Description: Walk through the wall to enter.

478654.Title: Rosary
478654.Description: In the [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478651), entered by walking through the wall.

478656.Title: Breakable Wall
478656.Description: Hit it from the western side.

478657.Title: Silkeater
478657.Description:
At the top of a secret passage behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478656).

_Note: You'll be attacked by a Vaultkeeper after collecting it._

478658.Title: Lever
478658.Description: At the end of a bridge. Removes the bridge's collision.

478662.Title: Lever
478662.Description: Outside the bench room. Lowers a platform.

478666.Title: Secret Room
478666.Description: Found by swimming all the way to the left.

478668.Title: Pale Oil
478668.Description:
Used to upgrade your damage and complete the [Pinmaster's Oil](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478211) Wish.

To reach it, complete a box puzzle in the room to the east.

478671.Title: Mask Shard
478671.Description: **Required:** Hit the box in the corridor below, entered via [Breakable Ceiling](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480007).

478672.Title: Rosary
478672.Description: In a high-up room, reached by hitting a [Box](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480004) from below.

478674.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478674.Description: Next to the [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478287). Whack the lever on top of it to enter the area below.

478675.Title: Passage
478675.Description: Hit this [Box](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480000) twice, then use it jump toward the north-eastern corner.

478676.Title: Memory Locket
478676.Description: At the top of the tunnel.

478677.Title: Rosary
478677.Description: At the top of the tunnel.

478679.Title: Ring
478679.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

Opens a passage in the floor below, leading to Bilewater.

478681.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478681.Description: Unlocked when you hit a lever below it.

478682.Title: Rosary
478682.Description: In a nook next to a box you'll need to hit from above.

478685.Title: Cogheart Piece 1
478685.Description:
**Required:** Complete memory puzzle.

**Solution:** (Bells numbered from left to right)
- 1 - 2 - 7 - 4
- 7 - 5 - 6 - 4 - 5
- 2 - 7 - 3 - 5 - 6 - 1

Used to repair the [Automaton](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616).

478687.Title: Lore
478687.Description:
_O, great land whose flame doth falter!_

_Whose choir, conductors, all doth fail,_

_Observe! Take heart! That spark still burning,_

_Yon butterfly of crimson grace,_

_All bells shall peal, and voices raise,_

_When brave Trobbio steps, at last, upon the stage!_

478688.Title: Breakable Wall
478688.Description: On the right side of a cage holding [Frayed Rosary String](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478273)

478689.Title: Shell Shards
478689.Description: At the end of the tunnel just above the entrance to the Stage.

478691.Title: Claw Mirror
478691.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Trobbio](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478690)

**Effect:** Emits a flash that damages surrounding enemies

478695.Title: Shell Shards
478695.Description: On the ceiling at the end of the tunnel.

478697.Title: Roachkeeper
478697.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478698.Title: Elevator
478698.Description: Leads to the [Underworks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478699). Reached after defeating [Trobbio](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478690).

478702.Title: Shell Shards
478702.Description:
In a secret nook at the top of the room.

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

478706.Title: Shell Shards
478706.Description: Beneath a platform near the room's exit.

478708.Title: Shell Shards
478708.Description: In a small room, reached by hitting a [lever in the room above.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480019)

478711.Title: Craftmetal
478711.Description:
At the end of a lava-filled tunnel.

Taking it will trigger an Undercrank ambush.

478714.Title: Clawline
478714.Description: **Effect:** Fling needle as a harpoon with silk

478716.Title: Locked Gate
478716.Description: Unlocked via lever on its western side.

478719.Title: Breakable Wall
478719.Description: Halfway up the spiky tower. Used after defeating a Roachkeeper and claiming his [Simple Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478280).

478720.Title: Shard Bundle
478720.Description:
On a ledge at the top of the room.

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

478721.Title: Swamp Squit
478721.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

478723.Title: Twelfth Architect
478723.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

**Store:**
- [Cogwork Wheel](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478725) - 360 Rosaries and 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)
- [Sawtooth Circlet](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478726) - 230 Rosaries and 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)
- [Scuttlebrace](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478727) - 140 Rosaries and 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)
- [Crafting Kit Upgrade](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478728) - 450 Rosaries
- [Architect's Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478729) - 110 Rosaries and 25 Tools
- Shards Bundle - 50 Rosaries
- [Silkshot (Twelfth Architect)](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478732) - 130 Rosaries + 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal) + [Ruined Tool](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478457)

478725.Title: Cogwork Wheel
478725.Description:
Purchased from [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723) for 360 Rosaries and 1 Craftmetal

**Effect:** Throws a buzzsaw on the ground which can climb walls and loop back around, potentially hitting an enemy multiple times

478726.Title: Sawtooth Circlet
478726.Description:
Purchased from [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723) for 230 Rosaries and 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)

**Effect:** Using the Drifter's Cloak or Faydown Cloak damages surrounding enemies

478727.Title: Scuttlebrace
478727.Description:
Purchased from [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723) for 140 Rosaries and 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)

**Effect:** Dodge backwards

478728.Title: Crafting Kit Upgrade
478728.Description:
Purchased from [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723) for 450 Rosaries

**Effect:** Increases tool damage

_Fully upgrading your crafting kit is a requirement for 100% completion._

478729.Title: Architect's Key
478729.Description:
**Required:** Acquire 25 tools

Can be purchased from [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723) for 110 Rosaries

Used to unlock the [Chapel of the Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478743)

478732.Title: Silkshot (Twelfth Architect)
478732.Description:
Purchased from [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723) for 130 Rosaries + 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal) + [Ruined Tool](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478457)

**Effect:** Triple projectile attack, uses Shell Shards and Silk

478737.Title: Bloatroach
478737.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

478738.Title: Mothleaf Lagnia
478738.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

478745.Title: Crest of Architect
478745.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Chapel of the Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478743)

**Slots:**
- 0 Silk Skills
- 3 Red
- 2 Blue
- 2 Yellow

478757.Title: Breakable Wall
478757.Description: Can be opened from either side.

478758.Title: Shell Shards
478758.Description: At the end of a tunnel at the bottom of a steam vent.

478761.Title: Breakable Ceiling
478761.Description: Jump and hit the diagonal support next to the [bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478429).

478774.Title: Psalm Cylinder - Whispering Vaults
478774.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

At the end of a parkour challenge that starts with this [Ring](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478679) before taking you into a [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480499) and beyond. Once you're back in an area where you can see the sky, head left and get ready for some combat before you reach the cylinder.

478778.Title: Heavy Rosary Necklace
478778.Description: From this [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478404), move left while alternating between the [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714) and [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971)

478783.Title: Twisted Bud
478783.Description:
At the top of a room behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480204).

Bring this to [Greyroot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478172)

478784.Title: Rosary
478784.Description: On the far right side of the dark corridor.

478785.Title: Breakable Wall
478785.Description: On the left side of the dark corridor. Jump to reach it.

478787.Title: Memory Locket
478787.Description: At the far-left edge of the [secret room.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478785) Bounce over the infested waters and wall-jump up the vertical space to reach it.

478792.Title: Rite of Rebirth
478792.Description:
**Required:** Bring [Twisted Bud](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478783) to [Greyroot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478172) after completing the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173) Wish.

**Wayfarer**

**Warning: Accepting this Wish will send you [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478793), force you to equip a new moveset, and strip you of your ability to equip tools and silk skills. You can't change Crests, either.**

To get rid of the parasite - talk to [Yarnaby](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478268) and complete the [Infestation Operation](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478814) Wish.

478793.Title: Chapel of the Witch
478793.Description: You'll be sent here after beginning the [Rite of Rebirth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792) Wish

478797.Title: Bellhart's Glory
478797.Description:
Appears on the notice board some time after completing [Restoration of Bellhart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478291)

**Donate**

400 Rosaries

**Reward:**
- [Bellhome Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479171)

478798.Title: My Missing Brother
478798.Description:
Appears on the notice board after completing [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207) and beginning Act 2.

**Wayfarer**

[Courier Pill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478806)

478806.Title: Courier Pill
478806.Description: Appears here during the [My Missing Brother](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478798) Wish.

478814.Title: Infestation Operation
478814.Description:
**Wayfarer**

Pay a visit to [Crull and Benjin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478355) in the Sinner's Road area and purchase their [Steel Spines](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480956) for 160 Rosaries.

**Reward:**
- Parasite is extracted
- [Witch Crest](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478815)

**Note - removing the parasite locks you out of the [Twisted Child](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479344) achievement.**

478815.Title: Crest of Witch
478815.Description:
**Required:**
- Take [Twisted Bud](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478783) to [Greyroot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478172)
- Complete [Rite of Rebirth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792) Wish
- Complete [Infestation Operation](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478814) Wish

**Slots:**
- 1 Silk Skill
- 2 Red
- 3 Blue

478822.Title: Temporary Bench - Flea Caravan
478822.Description: Only appears here while the Flea Caravan is present.

478825.Title: Spool Fragment
478825.Description:
At the end of a platforming sequence, starting [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480938).

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

478829.Title: Breakable Сeiling
478829.Description: Can be destroyed only from below

478833.Title: Silkeater
478833.Description: Partially hidden by a shelf at the eastern end of the room.

478834.Title: Breakable Wall
478834.Description: Hit it from the eastern side.

478836.Title: Memory Locket
478836.Description: Held by a corpse at the bottom of a magma-filled area found behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478834).

478839.Title: An Icon of Hope
478839.Description:
Appears on the board after beginning Act 2

**Donate**

440 Shell Shards

**Reward:**
- [Hornet Statuette](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479144)

478840.Title: Shell Shards
478840.Description: In the [Skull Cavern](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477968). Hit an explosive in the ceiling to reach it.

478841.Title: Mask Shard
478841.Description: **Required:** At the top of the [Skull Cavern](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477968). You'll need to reach the bottom before it becomes accessible.

478843.Title: Rosary Chest
478843.Description: At the top of the room, reached through a platforming challenge in the room to the left.

478844.Title: Savage Beastfly
478844.Description:
Appears here during the [Savage Beastfly](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478799) Wish

Drops the [Horn Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480175) upon death.

478847.Title: Breakable Ceiling
478847.Description: Hit the wooden support in the north-eastern corner.

478848.Title: Quick Sling
478848.Description:
In a secret area above two [Breakable Ceilings](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478847).

**Effect:** Throws tools twice with a single use (uses twice as much ammo)

478849.Title: Mask Shard
478849.Description:
At the end of a precarious series of corridors, filled with [Slubberlug](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478965) and parasite-infested waters.

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

478851.Title: Memory Locket
478851.Description: Held by a corpse in a breakable cocoon dangling from the ceiling.

478852.Title: Hidden Passage
478852.Description: Cling Grip up the left wall to get inside.

478853.Title: Breakable Wall
478853.Description: Attack from the western side, at the edge of the parasite-infested water.

478854.Title: Breakable Wall
478854.Description: Can be destroyed only from the Eastern side, by following the path through this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478853).

478855.Title: Shell Shards
478855.Description: At the top of the room.

478856.Title: Rosary
478856.Description: At the very top of the room.

478858.Title: Hidden Passage
478858.Description: In the north-eastern corner of the area outside the arena. Home to some silk flowers that are quite useful before the battle below.

478859.Title: Lore Tablet
478859.Description:
_Hate for their light. Hate for their pins. For their waste poured thick and endless._

_Fill your hearts with hate, for power has now been claimed, and with it we shall punish._

478861.Title: Groal The Great

478863.Title: Seeker's Soul
478863.Description:
Inside the first building you'll come across after defeating [Groal The Great](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478861).

Gathered as part of the [Silk and Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479243) Wish

478864.Title: Huntress
478864.Description:
Inside a building on top of the parasite-infested water.

Speak to her twice to begin the [Broodfeast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478865) Wish

478865.Title: Broodfeast
478865.Description:
**Hunt**

- Seared Organs - Harvested with:
    - [Flintslate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477986)
    - [Pimpillo](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478964)
    - [Voltvessels](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479121)
    - [Wispfire Lantern](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479156)
- Shredded Organs - Harvested with:
    - [Conchcutter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479230) 
    - [Sawtooth Circlet](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478726)
    - [Cogwork Wheel](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478725)
    - [Delver's Drill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478577)
    - [Architect Crest](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478745) [Charge Attacks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478510) 
    - [Beast Crest](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478020) Plunging Attacks
- Skewered Organs - Harvested with:
    - [Longpin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478158)
    - [Sting Shard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477917)

**Reward:**
- [Longclaw](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479240)

_Note: If the Wish isn't completed by Act 3, [Runt](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=481481) will appear in the same location to give you the 'Runtfeast' wish with the same objective and reward._

478866.Title: Jubilana
478866.Description: Only appears here after beginning [The Wandering Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478634) Wish.

478867.Title: Rosary
478867.Description: On a ledge, guarded by a [Choir Hornhead](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479887) and Choir Pouncer.

478869.Title: Breakable Wall
478869.Description: Hit it from the eastern side, two floors above the bench.

478870.Title: Sherma
478870.Description: Appears here before going to Songclave.

478872.Title: Locked Door
478872.Description: Can only be opened by hitting a lever on the eastern side

478874.Title: Rosary Chest
478874.Description: It may be stolen by Grindle.

478875.Title: Rosary
478875.Description: In a secret room, entered by walking through a wall to the east.

478876.Title: Locked Door
478876.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever on the western side, in a room entered from above.

478877.Title: Jubilana
478877.Description:
Complete [The Wandering Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478634) Wish

**Store:**
- [Ascendant's Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478878) - 350 Rosaries
-  [Mask Shard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478879) - 750 Rosaries
- [Simple Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478880) - 650 Rosaries
- [Spool Extender](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478881) - 720 Rosaries
- Rosary String - 80 Rosaries

_After [The Lost Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479244) Wish:_
- [Spider Strings](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479248) - 320 Rosaries
- [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479249) - 500 Rosaries
- [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479250) - 180 Rosaries
- [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479251) - 180 Rosaries

478878.Title: Ascendant's Grip
478878.Description:
Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 350 Rosaries

**Effect:** Cling to walls indefinitely

478879.Title: Mask Shard
478879.Description: Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 750 Rosaries

478880.Title: Simple Key
478880.Description: Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 650 Rosaries

478881.Title: Spool Extender
478881.Description:
Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 720 Rosaries


**Effect:** Allows the storing of additional Silk

478883.Title: Locked Door
478883.Description: Can be opened from western side

478887.Title: Loyal Mergwin
478887.Description:
Appears when you hit the strange glass case in the upper part of the room.

Speak to him twice to begin the [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish

478890.Title: Silkeater
478890.Description: In a secret room, reached by walking through the wall at the eastern edge of the dining room and climbing up through a few tunnels.

478891.Title: Breakable Wall
478891.Description: Hit it from the western side.

478892.Title: Breakable Wall
478892.Description: Hit it from the western side.

478893.Title: Rosary
478893.Description: At the edge of a spike pit.

478896.Title: Cogheart Piece 2
478896.Description:
**Required:** Complete memory puzzle.

**Solution:** (Bells numbered from left to right)
- 1 - 5 - 4 - 6
- 3 - 6 - 5 - 1 - 7
- 2 - 4 - 6 - 3 - 5 - 1

Used to repair the [Automaton](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616).

478897.Title: Silk Machine
478897.Description: Insert 40 Rosaries to replenish some Silk.

478900.Title: Shell Shards
478900.Description: In a side-room by the water's edge. Guarded by a Drapefly.

478901.Title: Breakable Wall
478901.Description: Can be opened from the eastern side

478902.Title: Rosary Chest
478902.Description:
At the highest point of the area, reached via [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714).

May be empty after defeating the [Cogwork Dancers](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478606), if [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478895) was rescued beforehand.

478903.Title: Cogfly
478903.Description:
**Required:** 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)

**Effect:** Winged cogwork companion that will seek nearby enemies and attack

478904.Title: Shell Shards
478904.Description:
Behind a waterfall in the room where you find the [Cogfly](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478903).

_Note: A Giant Drapemite will ambush you as you approach._

478906.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478906.Description: On a cart at the edge of the room.

478908.Title: Psalm Cylinder - High Halls
478908.Description: In the room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480051). To reach it, climb onto the platform at the leftmost side and [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714) your way into the tunnels. Continue to the right and wall-jump up to find it at the bottom of a tunnel at the far end.

478910.Title: Locked Trapdoor
478910.Description: Hit the lever above it to get it open.

478915.Title: Breakable Wall
478915.Description: Attack from the western side. Leads to a secret room holding a [Silkeater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478916).

478916.Title: Silkeater
478916.Description: On top of some ledges behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478915).

478919.Title: Choral Commandment
478919.Description: At the end of a room above the [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480039), easiest to reach via [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288).

478921.Title: Hidden Passage
478921.Description: Jump up through the ceiling where the spotlight shines brightest.

478922.Title: Lore Tablet
478922.Description:
_Oath of the Whiteward_

_While song must be sung, none may falter._

_Infirmity. Sickness. Death._

_All are banished from our Citadel._

478923.Title: Surgeon's Key
478923.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714) - dangle from the hoop for a few seconds, and a corpse will eventually appear holding this key.

_Note - taking the key will spawn a Dreg Husk._

Used to unlock a [Locked Trapdoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478913)

478926.Title: The Unravelled
478926.Description:
At the bottom of the pit beneath the [Locked Trapdoor - Surgeon](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478913).

**Reward:**
- [Silk Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479082)

478929.Title: Psalm Cylinder - Underworks
478929.Description:
At the end of a corridor behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480044).

_#2 - Last surgery of Conductor Mizello_

478933.Title: Balm for The Wounded
478933.Description:
**Required:** Discover [Whiteward](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478590) and speak to Sherma in Songclave. Can also be started by approaching him in [Whiteward](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479179).

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479180)

478934.Title: Cloaks of the Choir
478934.Description:
Appears on the notice board after completing [Building Up Songclave](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478631) and [Fine Pins](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478633).

**Hunt**

**Reward:**
- Heavy Rosary Necklace

478935.Title: Rosary
478935.Description: At the end of the area unlocked with a [Simple Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478911)

478936.Title: Pale Rosary Necklace
478936.Description: In a chest at the end of the area unlocked with a [Simple Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478911)

478937.Title: Rosary Cannon
478937.Description:
Behind a breakable wall in the [Rosary Storage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478911) - Simple Key required

**Effect:** Shoots rosaries

478941.Title: Lore Tablet
478941.Description:
_Sister, spider, if seeking commune with the creature atop this mount, take the climb above as a test, a challenge beyond even our setting._

_Upon that summit gained, and creature hailed, know it shall choose what gift to grant, with death as likely as insight._

478942.Title: Shell Shards
478942.Description: At the end of a high-up ledge.

478943.Title: Rosary
478943.Description: On a ledge above the trapdoor.

478944.Title: Breakable Wall
478944.Description: Leads to the [Bench ](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478383) room. Attack from the western side.

478946.Title: Rosary
478946.Description: In the secret area behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478945).

478947.Title: Memory Crystal
478947.Description:
Inside a large shard of ice at the end of a tunnel.

**Effect:** When you take damage, leave an ice clone behind that shoots out spikes when hit by an enemy.

478958.Title: Frayed Rosary String
478958.Description: Held by a corpse on a high-up ledge.

478959.Title: Breakable Wall
478959.Description: All the way to the right after falling into the water beneath the [TRAPPED Bench - Bilewater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478407)

478961.Title: Rope
478961.Description: In the area reached after defeating [Groal The Great](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478861). Hit it to create a wall in the area down below for easier Cling Gripping.

478962.Title: Barnak
478962.Description: Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

478963.Title: Key of Apostate
478963.Description:
Inside a cage. Hit it a few times to get the key out.

_The thing above it is a Wardenfly stuck in a Barnak's mouth - it can't interacted with._

478964.Title: Pimpillo
478964.Description:
Interact with the table.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189), [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal) (x1)

**Effect:** Grenade. Explodes on impact or a few seconds after throwing.

478965.Title: Slubberlug
478965.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

478966.Title: Miremite
478966.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

478967.Title: Breakable Wall
478967.Description: Can be destroyed only from the Eastern side, by following the path through this [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478853).

478968.Title: Lore Tablet
478968.Description:
_Their shells are ours. Their souls are ours._

_Our hate is forever._

478969.Title: Breakable Wall
478969.Description: At the upper edge of the flooded room. Attack from the western side.

478971.Title: Breakable Wall
478971.Description: At the water's edge. Attack from the eastern side.

478974.Title: Fluttermite
478974.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

478975.Title: Mitemother
478975.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478976.Title: Breakable Wall
478976.Description: Attack it from the western side.

478979.Title: Thread Raker
478979.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

478980.Title: Splinter
478980.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

478982.Title: Elevator
478982.Description: Press a button to lower it.

478983.Title: Shellwood Gnat
478983.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

478990.Title: Breakable Wall
478990.Description: Enter the cage from the west and hit its eastern wall.

478991.Title: Roachserver
478991.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

478992.Title: Disgraced Chef Lugoli
478992.Description:
Hit the gong and defeat two [Roachserver](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478991) to begin the fight.

**Reward:**
- [Pickled Muckmaggot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478993)

478993.Title: Pickled Muckmaggot
478993.Description:
Dropped by [Disgraced Chef Lugoli](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478992).

Part of the [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish

478996.Title: Breakable Ceiling
478996.Description: At the top of a thin vertical space, reached after clearing the [Rooted Cogs](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478278)

479000.Title: Snitchfly
479000.Description:
Defeat 4 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Note: If they grab you, you'll lose Rosaries!_

479001.Title: Mask Shard
479001.Description:
At the top of a room behind the [Locked Door - Apostate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478463) that holds a platforming challenge.

Easiest to reach via [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288).

479004.Title: Drapemite
479004.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479005.Title: Penitent
479005.Description: Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

479006.Title: Puny Penitent
479006.Description: Defeat 6 to complete the hunter's notes.

479007.Title: Guardfly
479007.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479008.Title: Scabfly
479008.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479010.Title: Breakable Wall
479010.Description: Attack from the eastern side to return to the main room.

479011.Title: Wardenfly
479011.Description: Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

479012.Title: Lever
479012.Description: Near the bottom of the elevator shaft. Opens a trapdoor nearby.

479013.Title: Drapefly
479013.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479014.Title: Lever
479014.Description: On a ledge beside the elevator shaft, reached by passing through the [Locked Door - Apostate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478478)

479015.Title: Lore
479015.Description:
_Penitent, Eight of the Twelfth._

_Guilty of the sin of irreverence._

_Penance by chaining._

_Absolution granted after death._

_Penitent, Second of the Fourth._

_Guilty of the sin of dissonance._

_Penance by silencing._

_Absolution granted after death._

479016.Title: Lore
479016.Description:
_Penitent, Fourth of the Fourth._

_Guilty of the sins of infirmity, sickness._

_Penance by swallowing._

_Absolution granted after death._

_Penitent, Twelfth of the First._

_Guilty of an unnamed sin._

_Penance by casting._

_Absolution not granted._

479017.Title: Memory Locket
479017.Description:
Inside the [shortcut cave](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479019). Look out for a breakable wall as you climb a vertical space.

**Required:** [Key of Apostate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478963)

479018.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479018.Description: Reached by squeezing through a [shortcut cavern down below.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479019)

479019.Title: Shortcut
479019.Description:
A short cavern (home to a [Memory Locket](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479017)) that leads to a [Breakable Ceiling](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479018).

Also functions as a way into The Slab's main areas if you have a [Key of Apostate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478963) and the cage-carrying Wardenflies are all dead.

479021.Title: Rosary
479021.Description: In the room behind the [Locked Door - Heretic](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479020)

479022.Title: Lore
479022.Description:
**Note: Will disappear after breaking all of the bindings outside the cell.**

_Penitent, First of the First._

_Guilty of the sin of apostasy._

_Penance by constriction._

_Absolution denied._

479025.Title: Rune Rage
479025.Description:
Reward for defeating [First Sinner](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479023).

**Effect:** Weaves runes of blazing Silk upon enemies.

479030.Title: Breakable Floor
479030.Description: Stand on top of it after dealing with the Snitchflies.

479033.Title: Shell Shards
479033.Description: At the edge of the water below a breakable floor.

479034.Title: Weaver Effigy
479034.Description: Held by a corpse at the end of the upper path.

479035.Title: Temporary Bench - Mount Fay
479035.Description: Only appears here while [Shakra](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478940) is present.

479036.Title: Driftlin
479036.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479037.Title: Breakable Wall
479037.Description: Near the end of the crystal maze.

479039.Title: Locked Trapdoor
479039.Description:
Right above the area's [bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478383).
Must be opened from underneath

479041.Title: Servitor Boran
479041.Description: Defeat 5 to complete the hunter's notes.

479043.Title: Mnemonid
479043.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479045.Title: Locked Trapdoor
479045.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever above it.

479046.Title: Mask Maker
479046.Description: Inside the building. You can unmask the maker with a [charged needle strike](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478510) for additional dialogue.

479047.Title: Elevator
479047.Description: At the top of the area.

479048.Title: Nuu - Second Encounter
479048.Description: Appears here some time after [Sister Splinter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478137) is defeated.

479050.Title: Breakable Wall
479050.Description: Leads to a [Pollip Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478198). Attack from the eastern side.

479051.Title: Breakable Wall
479051.Description: At the bottom of a pit patrolled by two Winged Furm, near some spikes. Attack from the western side.

479052.Title: Breakable Wall
479052.Description: Attack from the western side to find some [Rosaries](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478196).

479054.Title: Shakra - Bellhart
479054.Description:
Found on a ledge after defeating [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138).

**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Hunter's March Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479518) - 70 Rosaries
- [Greymoor Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479527) - 70 Rosaries
- [Bellhart Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479529) - 40 Rosaries
- [Shellwood Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479530) - 70 Rosaries
- [Sinner's Road Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479526) - 90 Rosaries
- [Blasted Steps Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479673) - 70 Rosaries
- [Mount Fay Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479525) - 40 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosary
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Ventrica Pins (80 Rosaries)
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries
- Dark Marker - 90 Rosaries
- Bronze Marker - 120 Rosaries

479055.Title: Secret Room
479055.Description: Equip the [Silkspeed Anklets](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478216) and drink [Flea Brew](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478025), then run across the platforms to reveal it.

479056.Title: Lore
479056.Description:
At the end of the path beneath the [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479055).

_A rune depicting paths away from Pharloom._

479057.Title: Rune Harp
479057.Description: At the end of the path beneath the [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479055). Equip [Silkspeed Anklets](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478216) and drink [Flea Brew](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478025), then run through the room above to reach it.

479058.Title: Tarmite
479058.Description:
Encountered while fighting the [Savage Beastfly](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478844), and again in an ambush at the bottom of the [Skull Cavern](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477968).
If both encounters have been completed, they spawn naturally here in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260).

Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479059.Title: Breakable Wall
479059.Description: At the top of an air current. Use the [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971) to reach it.

479060.Title: Shakra - Hunter's March
479060.Description:
Appears here if you abandon the enemy ambush instead of beating it with her.

**Store:**
- [Mosslands Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479514) - 40 Rosaries
- [The Marrow Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479515)  - 50 Rosaries
- [Deep Docks Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479516) - 50 Rosaries
- [Far Fields Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479517) - 50 Rosaries
- [Hunter's March Map](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479518) - 70 Rosaries
- [Quill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852) - 50 Rosary
- [Compass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477851) - 70 Rosaries
- Bench Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Bellway Pins - 60 Rosaries
- Vendor Pins - 80 Rosaries
- Shell Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Ring Marker - 40 Rosaries
- Hunt Marker - 60 Rosaries

479062.Title: Breakable Wall
479062.Description: Two breakable walls in rapid succession, leading to a [Memory Locket](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478372).

479067.Title: Secret Room
479067.Description: Secret room located to the left of bench, through the water

479069.Title: Mossberry
479069.Description:
Growing from the ceiling in [Weavenest Atla.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476902)

_Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

479070.Title: Weavelight
479070.Description:
Inside a decoration on the ceiling of the rooftop where you fight [Moss Mother x2](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478440)


**Effect:** Increases the speed of Silk regeneration.

479072.Title: Secret Room
479072.Description: Built into the ceiling - requires [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103) to reach.

479074.Title: Skullwing
479074.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479075.Title: Mossgrub
479075.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479076.Title: Mossmir
479076.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479077.Title: Mawling
479077.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479078.Title: Gromling
479078.Description:
Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Note: In act 3, their only spawn point is around [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479081)._

479080.Title: Grom
479080.Description:
Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Note: Easier to kill after two [damage upgrades](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478210)._

479081.Title: Dead Bug's Purse
479081.Description:
Held by a corpse in a small room guarded by 2 Gromlings.

**Effect:** Retain some rosaries upon defeat.

Play the needolin here for more lore.

479083.Title: Lever
479083.Description: On a ledge. Lowers a platform.

479090.Title: Lore Tablet
479090.Description:
_Due to unacceptably high injury and unsanctioned deaths, Ventrica travel shall henceforth be denied to all._

_For Pharloom eternal, a bug who serves must never die._

479092.Title: Lore
479092.Description:
_Weaver, in eighth part, last of their line, frail with age._

_Tracked and taken in Sandsea Waste._

_Seven Choristors, nine Envoys lost to task._

479093.Title: Lore
479093.Description:
_Weaver, in eighth part, last of their line, mortally wounded._

_Tracked and taken in the Blackbarrens._

_Four Choristors, one Reed lost to task._

479094.Title: Lore
479094.Description:
_Weaver, in quarter part, last of their line, staked to service._

_Tracked and taken beneath the City of Steel._

_Eight Choristors, twelve Envoys lost to task._

479097.Title: Breakable Floor
479097.Description: Can be destroyed by pulling the lever on the top of it

479098.Title: Shell Shards
479098.Description: In a secret room, accessed by walking through a wall to the west.

479099.Title: Grand Mother Silk
479099.Description:
End Boss

**Reward:**
- Steel Soul Mode (Death is Permanent)

479101.Title: Hidden Passage
479101.Description: Cling Grip up the wall to reach it.

479106.Title: Cogheart Piece 3
479106.Description:
**Required:** Complete memory puzzle

**Solution:** (Bells numbered from left to right, starting on top row)
- 7 - 2 - 4 - 6
- 4 - 2 - 1 - 4 - 3
- 1 - 5 - 6 - 2 - 7 - 3

Used to repair the [Automaton](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616).

479108.Title: Mossberry
479108.Description: _Initially gathered as part of the [Berry Picking](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477876) Wish. After completing it, bring additional Mossberries to the druid for Rosaries - and an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255)._

479109.Title: Breakable Wall
479109.Description: Can only be destroyed from the eastern side

479111.Title: Breakable Wall
479111.Description: Can only be destroyed from the western side.

479112.Title: Lore Tablet
479112.Description:
_Containment fails. Memory lost. Excise outer. Maintain inner._

_Shellwood stasis sustained - Remember._

_Marrowlands stasis critical - Remember._

_Verdanian environment exceeded - Destined to forget._

479114.Title: Breakable Wall
479114.Description: Can only be destroyed from the eastern side

479115.Title: Shell Shards
479115.Description: On the ceiling above the exit.

479116.Title: Breakable Floor
479116.Description: Can only be destroyed from above

479118.Title: Breakable Wall
479118.Description: Can only be destroyed from the western side

479119.Title: Materium
479119.Description:
Can be assembled in a [Bellhome](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479175) after purchasing a Desk. Note that filling it is *not* required for 100% completion.

**Effect:** Displays previously collected and inspected key materials and relics

**All Entries (In the order they appear on the Desk:**
- Silk
- Shell Shards
- Rosaries
- Shell Rosaries
- Pearl Rosaries
- Mossberry
- [Mossberry Stew](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479220)

- [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal)

- Plasmified Blood
- Ragpelt ([Crawbug Clearing](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478208))
- Pollip Heart ([Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173))

- [Bone Scroll](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479150)
- [Weaver Effigy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478093)
- [Weaver Effigy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478794)
- [Weaver Effigy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479034)
- [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477867)
- [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478914)
- [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478919)
- [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479251)
- [Rune Harp](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478231)
- [Rune Harp](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479057)
- [Rune Harp](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479495)
- [Arcane Egg](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479281)
- [Psalm Cylinder - High Halls](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478908)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Underworks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478929)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Whispering Vaults](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478774)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478530)
- [Psalm Cylinder - Vaultkeeper Cardinius Lair](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478650)
- [Sacred Cylinder](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479717)
- [Sprintmaster Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479634)
- [Guardian's Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479638)
- [Hero's Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479632)
- [Hunter's Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479635)
- [Grey Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479630)
- [Surface Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479542)
- [Craw Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479580)
- [Encrusted Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480195) (Or whichever heart-holding boss you slay last)

479120.Title: Breakable Wall
479120.Description: Can only be destroyed from the western side

479121.Title: Voltvessels
479121.Description: **Effect:** When thrown, forms an electrical orb

479122.Title: Huge Flea
479122.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

479123.Title: Hidden Passage
479123.Description: Double jump into the cloth to find it.

479124.Title: Shard Bundle
479124.Description: At the very end of the area, reached by hopping the balcony in a [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479123) to the west.

479128.Title: Putrified Ducts Map
479128.Description: At the top of the room, reached by letting yourself be grabbed by a Barnark enemy's tongue.

479129.Title: Breakable Wall
479129.Description: Can be destroyed from the western side

479130.Title: Shell Shards
479130.Description: In a corridor you can reach by letting yourself be grabbed by a Barnak.

479131.Title: Shell Shards
479131.Description: On a ledge at the edge of the maggot-infested water.

479133.Title: Wreath of Purity
479133.Description: **Effect:** Repel Muckmaggots and maggot-based attacks for ~6.5 seconds before breaking. Can be repaired at a bench.

479134.Title: Hidden Passage
479134.Description: Jump up into the niche and continue left.

479136.Title: Breakable Wall
479136.Description: Can be destroyed from the eastern side

479137.Title: Hidden Passage
479137.Description: Use the Barnark enemy's tongue to reach it.

479138.Title: Vog
479138.Description:
Required to complete the flea caravan and receive Fleamaster Mooshka's final gift. Joins the Flea Caravan wherever they are currently based after a brief chat.

To reach her, start from this [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479137).

479139.Title: Craftmetal
479139.Description:
In a crevice above the water.

**Required:** [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103)

479140.Title: Shell Shards
479140.Description: On the ceiling above the water. Don't worry the shards float.

479141.Title: Riddle Tablet
479141.Description:
**Required:** [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288) to reach it

**Locations of Herald the Mushroom:**
- [Mister Mushroom 1](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479146) - "Under chapel fallen to the monarch's might"
- [Mister Mushroom 2](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479362) - "Over camp collapsed to the black thread plight"
- [Mister Mushroom 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479312) - "Scorched field on edge, shells black and burned"
- [Mister Mushroom 4](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479315) - "Up towers spinning, near the surgeon spurned"
- [Mister Mushroom 5](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479311) - "Cage of one who raged against the silken lie"
- [Mister Mushroom 6](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479314) - "Fell heart of frost, who soars on high"
- [Mister Mushroom 7](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479330) - "Past cradle's peak, last test of fitness"

479142.Title: Passing of the Age
479142.Description:
Interact with the [Riddle Tablet](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479141)

**Witness**

**Locations of Herald the Mushroom:**
- [Mister Mushroom 1](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479146) - "Under chapel fallen to the monarch's might"
- [Mister Mushroom 2](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479362) - "Over camp collapsed to the black thread plight"
- [Mister Mushroom 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479312) - "Scorched field on edge, shells black and burned"
- [Mister Mushroom 4](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479315) - "Up towers spinning, near the surgeon spurned"
- [Mister Mushroom 5](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479311) - "Cage of one who raged against the silken lie"
- [Mister Mushroom 6](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479314) - "Fell heart of frost, who soars on high"
- [Mister Mushroom 7](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479330) - "Past cradle's peak, last test of fitness"

**Reward:**
- ??
- [Passing of the Age Achievement](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479363)

479143.Title: Needolin Lore
479143.Description:
**Required:** [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199). **Must be read before the Flea Caravan will move here.**

_Sisters, spiders, watch these waters flow,_

_Cleansing Binding, as Silk from shell,_

_Memories of our kingdom calm._

479144.Title: Hornet Statuette
479144.Description:
**Required:** Complete all donation wishes in Bone Bottom, then speak to Flick next to the notice board.
- [Bone Bottom Repairs](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477884)
- [A Lifesaving Bridge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478220)
- [An Icon of Hope](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478839)

Break it down in your inventory for 60 Shell Shards.

479145.Title: Vesticrest
479145.Description:
**Required:** Unlock 4 Crests and talk to [Eva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228)

**Effect:** +1 Yellow tool slot on all Crests

479147.Title: Pristine Core
479147.Description:
**Required:** Purchase all of the Twelfth Architect's supplies, and return some time later.

When destroyed, it breaks into 220 shell shards.

479149.Title: Moorwing
479149.Description:
May only appear in this area if you didn't fight it [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478453).

**Reward:**
- Beast Shard

479150.Title: Bone Scroll
479150.Description:
At the very top of a platforming challenge. You'll need a fair bit of silk!

Crumpled parchment containing the prayer of a Burning Bug.

"Hail to your heat! O glorious flame. You who builds and breaks us. Sear our shells. Char them black. That we may rise to join you, wreathed in bright and blazing joy."

479151.Title: Mask Shard
479151.Description:
**Required:** [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103) + [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

At the end of a platforming challenge.

479152.Title: Rosary Necklace
479152.Description: On a ledge above the Wisp spawners.

479156.Title: Wispfire Lantern
479156.Description:
