**Required:** Defeat [Father of the Flame](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479155)

**Effect:** Spawn wisps that attack enemies

479157.Title: Craftmetal
479157.Description: At the end of a hidden path, found in the top-left part of the area filled with fire wisp spawners.

479161.Title: Rosary
479161.Description: In a tiny crevice at the edge of the room full of square saws.

479163.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479163.Description: Can be smashed only by passing through [Wisp Thicket area](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478337) and traversing a room full of saws.

479166.Title: Vintage Nectar
479166.Description: At the bottom of the Halfway Home's basement. Purchase access to it from [Creige](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478040) for 480 Rosaries after beginning the [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish.

479167.Title: Tool Pouch Upgrade
479167.Description:
Complete [Bugs of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478042) Wish

**Effect:** Increases the capacity for Tools and Shell Shards that can be carried

_Fully upgrading your tool pouch is a requirement for 100% completion._

479171.Title: Bellhome Key
479171.Description:
**Required:** Complete all donation wishes in Bellhart
- [Restoration of Bellhart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478291)
- [Bellhart's Glory](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478797)

Afterwards, talk to [Pavo](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478202) to get the key.

479174.Title: Courier's Rasher
479174.Description:
[Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish

**Required:**
- [My Missing Courier](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478207) Wish
- [My Missing Brother](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478798) Wish

479175.Title: Bellhome
479175.Description:
**Required:** [Bellhome Key](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479171)

[Materium](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479119) and [Farsight](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479289) can be assembled here after purchasing a Desk.

479179.Title: Sherma - Whiteward
479179.Description: Appears here after beginning the [Balm for The Wounded](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478933) Wish.

479184.Title: Silkeater
479184.Description: Given to you by [Styx](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478266) when you die.

479185.Title: Shell Shards
479185.Description: At the edge of a spike pit.

479186.Title: Locked Door
479186.Description: Can be opened from the eastern side, from within the [secret room.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=481241)

479188.Title: Breakable Wall
479188.Description: Can be destroyed from the eastern side in Act 3.

479192.Title: Sprintmaster Swift
479192.Description:
Speak to him to begin the [Fastest in Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479193) Wish.

**Reward:**
- [Sprintmaster Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479634) - Complete a race in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

479193.Title: Fastest in Pharloom
479193.Description:
Begun by speaking to [Sprintmaster Swift](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479192).

**Sprint**

**Reward:**
- Rosary Necklace - First Race
- Beast Shard - Second Race
- [Mask Shard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479194) - Third Race
- [Sprintmaster Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479634) - Fourth Race (after completing [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387))

479195.Title: Locked Gate
479195.Description: Unlocked by a lever on the eastern side.

479197.Title: Hidden Passage
479197.Description: Jump at the wall to get inside.

479198.Title: Skarrsinger Karmelita
479198.Description:
Fought in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) during the [Heart of the Wild](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479390) objective.

**Reward:**
-  Hunter's Heart 
- [Diva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479406)

479200.Title: Vog - Flea Caravan
479200.Description:
**Required:** Find [Vog](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479138) in Putrified Ducts area

Exchange rosaries to have Lost Fleas marked on your map.

479201.Title: Snitch Pick
479201.Description:
Sold by [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) for 740 Rosaries

**Effect:** Harpoon into enemies to get Rosaries and Shell Shards

479202.Title: Nuu - Fourth Encounter
479202.Description: Appears here some time after defeating the [Great Conchflies](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478506).

479203.Title: Lore
479203.Description:
_Coral sways,_

_Clear water flows,_

_Upon our river free of time._

479204.Title: Memory Locket
479204.Description: Held by a corpse at the top of the area.

479210.Title: Breakable Wall
479210.Description: Can be destroyed from the eastern (Sands of Karak) side.

479211.Title: Breakable Wall
479211.Description: Attack from the western side after sending the [Elevator](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480371) down, then jumping over it.

479213.Title: Shardillard
479213.Description:
In the room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479211).

Defeat 5 to complete the [hunter's notes.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480162)

479214.Title: Breakable Wall
479214.Description: Leads to a [Bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478388). Attack from the western side.

479215.Title: Simple Key
479215.Description: Held by a corpse sitting on the bench

479219.Title: Crustnut
479219.Description:
Gathered as part of the [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish

[Conchcutter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479230) will make this room easier

479220.Title: Mossberry Stew
479220.Description: Given to you by the Druid when you speak to them during the [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish.

479222.Title: Hidden Passage
479222.Description:
**Required:** [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288)

It's also possible to get inside by using the [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714) from the very top of the western wall, then using the [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103) to double jump immediately afterward and wall-jumping your way up. Much easier with [Ascendant's Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478878), and easier still with Silk Soar.

479224.Title: Volt Filament
479224.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Voltvyrm](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479223)

**Effect:** Electric charge on Silk Skills

479225.Title: Voltridian
479225.Description: Inspect it to unlock its entry in the [Materium](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479119).

479229.Title: Lore
479229.Description:
_At water's source,_

_And coral's heart,_

_Our lord born last to rule._

479230.Title: Conchcutter
479230.Description:
Found almost immediately after entering the Coral Tower.

**Effect:** Throwable weapon, can also ricochet from surfaces

479233.Title: Pale Oil
479233.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish.

Bring it to [Pinmaster Plinney](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478210).

479237.Title: Trail's End
479237.Description:
**Required:** Meet Shakra in all locations to find it on any notice board.
- [Bone Bottom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477886)
- [The Marrow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477850)
- [Deep Docks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477904)
- [Far Fields](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477929)
- [Greymoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478048)
- [Bellhart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479054)
- [Shellwood](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478171)
- [Blasted Steps](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478307)
- [Wormways](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478330)
- [Hunter's March](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479060)
- [Sinner's Road](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478274)
- [Mount Fay](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478940)
- [Sands of Karak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478523)
- [Bilewater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478736)

You can then find Shakra [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479242).

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- [Throwing Ring](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479242)

479240.Title: Longclaw
479240.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Broodfeast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478865) Wish

**Effect:** Increases the range of needle

479241.Title: Passage
479241.Description: Only accessible after beginning the [Trail's End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479237) Wish

479242.Title: Throwing Ring
479242.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Trail's End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479237) Wish

**Effect:** Rebounds between enemies and hard surfaces

479243.Title: Silk and Soul
479243.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Lace](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479088), find 25 Fleas and move the Flea Caravan to [Fleatopia](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479143), complete the [Trail's End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479237) Wish, and talk to [Caretaker](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478601). You may also need to unlock the [Bellhome](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479175).

**Collect:**
- [Maiden's Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479256)
- [Hermit's Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479258)
- [Seeker's Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478863)
- [Snare Setter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479071)

**Reward:**
- [Soul Snare](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) Objective

479244.Title: The Lost Merchant
479244.Description:
Appears on the notice board after obtaining the [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103) and completing [The Wandering Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478634) / [Strengthening Songclave](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479239) Wishes.

**Wayfarer**

Search for Jubilana - again. She can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479247)

**Reward:**
- New items in [Jubilana's](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) store

479245.Title: Final Audience
479245.Description:
Activate the [Second Sentinel](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616), then watch any two of his fights. They happen in the following areas:
- [Second Sentinel - Second Encounter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480401)
- [Second Sentinel - Third Encounter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480402)
- [Second Sentinel - Fourth Encounter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480991)

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- [Reserve Bind](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479254)

479248.Title: Spider Strings
479248.Description:
**Required:** Complete [The Lost Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479244) Wish

Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 320 Rosaries

**Effect:** Expands the range of the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199), and makes Needolin dialogue / lore appear and cycle faster.

479249.Title: Spool Fragment
479249.Description:
**Required:** Complete [The Lost Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479244) Wish

Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 500 Rosaries

479250.Title: Craftmetal
479250.Description:
**Required:** Complete [The Lost Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479244) Wish

Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 180 Rosaries

479251.Title: Choral Commandment
479251.Description:
**Required:** Complete [The Lost Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479244) Wish

Can be purchased from [Jubilana](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478877) for 210 Rosaries

479253.Title: Second Sentinel
479253.Description:
Can only be fought after beginning the [Final Audience](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479245) Wish.

**Reward:**
- [Reserve Bind](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479254)

479254.Title: Reserve Bind
479254.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Second Sentinel](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479253)

**Effect:** Holds a Bind's worth of silk that can be used even when out of silk. Refills at benches.

479256.Title: Maiden's Soul
479256.Description: Speak to the [Chapel Maid](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477833) during the [Silk and Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479243) Wish to receive it.

479258.Title: Hermit's Soul
479258.Description: Speak to the [Bell Hermit](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478320) during the [Silk and Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479243) Wish to receive it.

479260.Title: Soul Snare
479260.Description:
_Scale the Citadel and ensnare its monarch in a deadly trap._

**Required:** Complete [Silk and Soul](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479243) Wish    

Use [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) on [Grand Mother Silk](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479099) at the end of the fight. After the credits roll, load your save file to begin ACT 3.

**Next Objective:** [After the Fall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479261)

479261.Title: After the Fall
479261.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

_Discover the fate of Pharloom._

**Previous Objective:** [Soul Snare](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

**Next Objective:** [Awaiting the End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479262)

479262.Title: Awaiting the End
479262.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

_Confront the Caretaker and his family in the Ruined Chapel beside Bone Bottom._

**Previous Objective:** [After the Fall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479261)  

**Next Objective:** [The Dark Below](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479267)

479263.Title: Beast in the Bells
479263.Description:
_Descend into the bellway and defeat the hostile creature within._

[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Defeat [Bell Eater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479264)

479265.Title: Beastling Call
479265.Description:
Defeat [Bell Eater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479264)

**Effect:** Summon beastlings from any location - will teleport to the last used Bellway Station

479267.Title: The Dark Below
479267.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

_Find aid in Deep Docks to access its diving bell and descend beneath Pharloom._

**Previous Objective:** [Awaiting the End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479262)  

**Next Objective:** [Return to Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479283)

479269.Title: Lore
479269.Description:
_Flickering Flame_

_Five masks swirled soul, brought and broiled._

_Four stones rage-baked, crushed powder coarse._

_Three shells fresh from pilgrims fallen, to contain and age._

479273.Title: Plasmified Zango
479273.Description:
Available in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

His aggro state and health does not reset upon leaving the room. He is also a good source for Plasmified Blood for the [Advanced Alchemy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479278) Wish, being able to withstand 4 charged stabs.

479279.Title: Diving Bell Key
479279.Description:
Available in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260).

Used to enter the [Diving Bell](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478838).

479280.Title: Shell Shards
479280.Description: At the end of a short tunnel beneath the spot where you enter The Abyss for the first time.

479281.Title: Arcane Egg
479281.Description: At the end of a long platforming sequence filled with spikes.

479285.Title: Shell Shards
479285.Description: In a hidden room with an entrance to the east.

479287.Title: Lore
479287.Description:
Adds [Void Tendrils](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479744) to the Hunter's Journal.

_A rune-scroll depicting void given form._

479289.Title: Farsight
479289.Description:
Can be assembled in a [Bellhome](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479175)

**Effect:** Completion quantities will be displayed in menus

479290.Title: Lore
479290.Description:
_Erase our fear,_ 

_Eliminate our desire,_

_To suffer no more,_

_Void, cleanse us._

479291.Title: Lore
479291.Description:
_In silence your voice,_

_In darkness your form,_

_We higher who see you seeking,_

_Our shells yearn for your embrace._

479292.Title: Breakable Floor
479292.Description: Attack from above, on the western side.

479301.Title: Entrance to Lost Verdania
479301.Description: Requires saving [Green Prince](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478342) with a Simple Key, and being in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260). Speak to him again [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479367).

479309.Title: Magnetite Dice
479309.Description:
Required: Beat [Lumble The Lucky](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478519) at dice enough times, or return to this spot after visiting the Choral Chambers.

**Effect:** Chance to negate an attack


**Note:** Can also be bought from [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) for 300 Rosaries in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

479310.Title: Green Prince - Second Encounter
479310.Description: Only appears here if freed from his [cell](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478342), after clearing the room of enemies. You may need to rest on a bench and return to the area before he will spawn.

479311.Title: Mister Mushroom 5
479311.Description:
[Passing of the Age](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142) Wish

**Required:**  [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199)

**Previous Location:** [Mister Mushroom 4](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479315)   
**Next Location:** [Mister Mushroom 6](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479314)

479312.Title: Mister Mushroom 3
479312.Description:
[Passing of the Age](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142) Wish

**Required:**  [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199)

**Previous Location:** [Mister Mushroom 2](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479362)   
**Next Location:** [Mister Mushroom 4](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479315)

479313.Title: Needolin Lore
479313.Description:
Lore revealed by playing [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199)

_Sister, spider, husk bound to branch,_

_Watch over these bugs, passing safe,_

_Warded by fear,_

_No longer your meal._

479314.Title: Mister Mushroom 6
479314.Description:
[Passing of the Age](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142) Wish

**Previous Location:** [Mister Mushroom 5](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479311)   
**Next Location:** [Mister Mushroom 7](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479330)

479315.Title: Mister Mushroom 4
479315.Description:
[Passing of the Age](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142) Wish

**Required:**  [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199)

**Previous Location:** [Mister Mushroom 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479312)   
**Next Location:** [Mister Mushroom 5](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479311)

479317.Title: Spool Fragment
479317.Description: Accessible once you've reached the [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480037). Climb to the top floor, summon the elevator, then quickly slide back down the hole. Wait next to the lever for the elevator to pass, then jump down to find this spool fragment at the bottom.

479318.Title: The Mist
479318.Description:
Use [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) when standing near fireflies, then exit the area in the direction they flew in. Repeat this a few times to exit for good.

Disappears when [Phantom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478370) is defeated.

479320.Title: Secret Room
479320.Description: Full of traps, and home to [Mottled Skarr](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478602).

479325.Title: Secret Room
479325.Description: Walk through the wall to enter.

479326.Title: Heavy Rosary Necklace
479326.Description:
Complete [Loddie's](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478251) second challenge by hitting the target 25 times.

Cannot be done in Act 3.

479330.Title: Mister Mushroom 7
479330.Description:
[Passing of the Age](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142) Wish

**Required:** EVERY movement ability. Good luck!

**Previous Location:** [Mister Mushroom 6](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479314)

479331.Title: Shortcut
479331.Description: Hit a lever on the western side to open a permanent path back to the Citadel Spa.

479335.Title: Arena Battle
479335.Description:
In a room only accessible once you've unlocked the [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189).

**Enemies:**
- 2x Beastfly + 1x Smelt Shoveller
- 1x Flintstone Flyer + 1x Pilgrim Hulk
- 2x Beastfly
- 1x Beastfly + 1x Flintstone Flyer + 1x Smokerock Sifter
- 4x Beastfly

479337.Title: Arena Battle
479337.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 1x Skarr Stalker
- 2x Skarrwing
- 1x Skarr Scout, 1x Spear Skarr
- 2x Skarr Scout
- 1x Spear Skarr, 1x Skarr Stalker

**In Act 3:**
- 1x Skarr Scout + 1x Skarr Stalker
- 2x Spear Skarr
- 1x Spear Skarr + 1x Skarr Stalker

479338.Title: Arena Battle
479338.Description:
Inside the building.

**Enemies:**
- 1 Squatcraw + 1 Craw
- 2 Craw
- 1 Tallcraw + 1 Craw
- 3 Craw
- 1 Squatcraw + 1 Tallcraw

479339.Title: Arena Battle
479339.Description:
**Enemies:**
- Skarr Scout x1
- Skarrlid x2
- Skarrwing x2
- Skarr Scout x1 + Skarrwing x1

479340.Title: Arena Battle
479340.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 1x Smelt Shoveller + 1x Flintstone Flyer
- 1x Smokerock Sifter
- 2x Flintstone Flyer
- 1x Flintstone Flyer + 1x Smokerock Sifter
- 1x Smelt Shoveller + 1x Smokerock Sifter

479344.Title: Twisted Child
479344.Description:
Defeat [Grand Mother Silk](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479099) while cursed.

The curse comes from completing the [Rite of the Pollip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478173), and bringing the [Twisted Bud](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478783) to [Greyroot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478172).

479346.Title: Glutton
479346.Description:
Satiate the Grand Gourmand.

_Unlocks when you complete [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889)._

479347.Title: Arena Battle
479347.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 1x Underworker, 1x Underloft
- 1x Underworker, 1x Underloft, 1x Undersweep
- 1x Underloft, 1x Undercrank
- 1x Undercrank (breaks floor and dies)
- 1x Underloft, 1x Underpoke

479355.Title: Weaver Queen
479355.Description: Defeat [Grand Mother Silk](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479099) and bind her power.

479356.Title: Snared Silk
479356.Description: Defeat [Grand Mother Silk](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479099) and entrap her with the [Soul Snare](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260).

479358.Title: Entwined
479358.Description:
Bind [Eva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228).

_To do so, you'll need to have found and used 18 Memory Lockets._

479360.Title: Nuu - Third Encounter
479360.Description: Appears some time after defeating the [Skull Tyrant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478136).

479361.Title: Garmond & Zaza
479361.Description:
Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

Only available in Act 2 - and will only appear in your second visit to this area.

479362.Title: Mister Mushroom 2
479362.Description:
[Passing of the Age](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142) wish

**Required:** [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199)

**Previous Location:** [Mister Mushroom 1](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479146)   
**Next Location:** [Mister Mushroom 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479312)

479363.Title: Passing of the Age
479363.Description: Grant [the Herald's wish](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479142), then beat the final boss.

479364.Title: Silkshot (Forge Daughter)
479364.Description:
Purchased from [Forge Daughter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476912) for 240 Rosaries + 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal) + [Ruined Tool](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478457)

**Effect:** Burst projectile attack

479366.Title: Captured
479366.Description: If the Wardenfly here catches you in its cage, you will be sent [HERE](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478462)

479367.Title: Green Prince - Third Encounter
479367.Description:
Appears after defeating the [Cogwork Dancers](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478606).

**Note:** Can also be found here in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

479369.Title: Breakable Floor
479369.Description: Hit an explosive rock on the northern side.

479371.Title: Locked Door
479371.Description: Can be opened with a lever on the eastern side, on top of a platform.

479372.Title: Garmond and Zaza - Third Encounter
479372.Description: After exiting the short underground tunnel outside the [Ventrica Station - Choral Chambers](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478424), they'll turn up to help you fight some enemies.

479373.Title: Garmond and Zaza - Fourth Encounter
479373.Description: Will help you deal with the enemies.

479375.Title: Arena Battle
479375.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 1x Undercrank + 1x Underloft
- 1x Undercrank + 1x Underpoke

_Tip: Kill the first Undercrank with tools before you get locked in for an easier fight!_

479376.Title: Arena Battle
479376.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 1x Filntstone Flyer, 1x Smelt Shoveller, 1x Smokerock Sifter
- 1x Flintflame Flyer
- 1x Deep Diver, 1x Smokerock Sifter, 1x Flintstone Flyer
- 2x Flintflame Flyer

479377.Title: Tormented Trobbio
479377.Description:
**Required:** [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) - part of the [Pain, Anguish and Misery](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479370) Wish.

**Reward:**
- [Dark Mirror](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479378) (Claw Mirror Upgrade)

479378.Title: Dark Mirror / Claw Mirrors
479378.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Tormented Trobbio](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479377)

**Effect:** Emits a blast that damages surrounding enemies

479379.Title: Old Penitent
479379.Description:
Use the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) to make him appear in the room with the cave-hole.

He gives lore about the prison and his sins. Re-enter the room and play to him three(??) times to make him sing.

479380.Title: Green Prince
479380.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Use [Elegy of the Deep](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479386) to get to the rest of the area

479383.Title: Lore
479383.Description:
In a tunnel above the [Lore Tablet](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479269), [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288)  required.

_Anguished Aura_

_Eight masks hard, swirled soul enraged._

_Twelve aknids flat, all juices strained._

_Six pilgrims living, hung long to drain._

479384.Title: Crest of Shaman
479384.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

In a tunnel above the [Lore Tablet](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479269), [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288)  required

**Slots:**
- 3 Silk Skill Slots
- 2 Blue

479385.Title: Spell Seeker
479385.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

_Return to the Snail Shamans in the Ruined Chapel beside Bone Bottom._

**Previous Objective:** [Return to Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479283)  

**Next Objective:** [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387)

**Reward:** [Elegy of the Deep](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479386)

479387.Title: The Old Hearts
479387.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

**Previous Objective:** [Spell Seeker](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479385)  

Complete:
-  [Heart of Might](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479388)
-  [Heart of the Woods](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479389)
-  [Heart of the Wild](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479390)

**Next Objective:** [Last Dive](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479431)



**Rewards:** Everbloom

479388.Title: Heart of Might
479388.Description:
**Objective:** [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387)  
**Next Objective:** ??

_Enlivened heart of Crust King Khann. It beats deep and slow._

479389.Title: Heart of the Woods
479389.Description:
**Objective:** [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387)  
**Next Objective:** ??

_Enlivened heart of Nyleth. It beats faint and fast._

479390.Title: Heart of the Wild
479390.Description:
**Objective:** [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387)  
**Next Objective:** ??

_Enlivened heart of Skarrsinger Karmelita. Its beat is steady and strong._

479400.Title: Shell Shards
479400.Description: At the end of a platforming challenge.

479401.Title: Shrine Guardian Seth
479401.Description:
After the fight, you can find him [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479407)

**Rewards:**
- None

479403.Title: Lore Tablet
479403.Description:
Inside the building.

_Here we honour the seed that sprung the wood._

_By her grace may all bugs pass safe to join us and our song._

479404.Title: Nyleth
479404.Description:
Fought in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) during the [Heart of the Woods](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479389) Objective.

**Reward:**
- Pollen Heart
- [Seed](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479405)

479407.Title: Seth - Greymoor
479407.Description:
**Previous Location:** [Shrine Guardian Seth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479401) 

May only appear after collecting at least two [old hearts.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387)
 
**Next Location:** [Shellwood](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479640)

479413.Title: Flower Essence 2
479413.Description:
Collect Essence in time.

_Tip: Push a leaf near the cliff and use Silk Soar_

479416.Title: Arena Battle
479416.Description:
**Enemies:**
- x2 Verdanir
- x1 Escalion + x1 Kindanir
- x1 Kindanir + x1 Escalion

479418.Title: Locked Door
479418.Description: **Required:** Press a button from the eastern side

479420.Title: Arena Battle
479420.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 1x Choristor, 1x Reed, 1x Envoy
- 2x Choristor
- 1x Choir Bellbearer, 1x Reed
- 2x Minister
- 2x Maestro
- 1x Choir Clapper
- 1x Choir Bellbearer, 2x Reed
- 2x Choir Bellbearer, 1x Choristor
- 1x Choir Bellbearer, 2x Minister
- 1x Maestro, 1x Reed
- 2x Choir Clapper

479423.Title: Fountain 1
479423.Description: One of three "Weeping Fountains" that must be unlocked to trigger the [Sacred Shrine](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479422)

479424.Title: Fountain 3
479424.Description: One of three "Weeping Fountains" that must be unlocked to trigger the [Sacred Shrine](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479422)

479425.Title: Fountain 2
479425.Description: One of three "Weeping Fountains" that must be unlocked to trigger the [Sacred Shrine](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479422)

479433.Title: Plasmium Gland
479433.Description:
**Required:** Complete [Advanced Alchemy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479278) Wish

**Effect:** Plasmium Phials can be crafted infinitely for free

479434.Title: Vesticrest Upgrade
479434.Description:
**Required:** Use 9 Memory Lockets and talk to [Eva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228)

**Effect:** +1 Blue tool slot on all Crests

479435.Title: Bench - Fleatopia
479435.Description: Only appears when the Flea Caravan moves here.

479436.Title: Tool Pouch Upgrade
479436.Description:
Find 20 Lost Fleas in Pharloom

**Effect:** Increases the capacity for Tools and Shell Shards that can be carried

_Fully upgrading your tool pouch is a requirement for 100% completion._

479439.Title: Egg of Flealia
479439.Description:
Find every Lost Flea in Pharloom

**Effect:** Decreases the cost of Silk Skills while health is full

479443.Title: Fatal Resolve
479443.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) - Appears on the board some time after returning from The Abyss. Can also be started inside the [Pinstress](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478529)' hot air balloon.

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- [Pin Badge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479466)

479444.Title: Ecstasy of the End
479444.Description:
Appears on the notice board in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) after finding every Lost Flea

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- [Pale Oil](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479582)

479445.Title: Hero's Call
479445.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) - appears on the board after encountering Garmond and Zaza enough times for Hornet to make a comment about them needing to rest. [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387) Wish may need to be active or completed, too.

**Wayfarer**

**Reward:**
- [Hero's Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479632)

479450.Title: Sherma
479450.Description:
Appears here some time after ringing the bell.

Returns after completing the [Balm for The Wounded](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478933) Wish.

479451.Title: Hidden Passage
479451.Description:
**Required:** [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103)

Move the carriage and place it under the falling water. Leads to a secret area that permanently disables Clawmaiden spawns (and completes their entry in the Hunter's Journal.)

479456.Title: Pinmaster Plinney
479456.Description:
Appears here in Act 3.

Rescue him from an Arena Battle and he'll be back at Bellhart ready to sharpen your needle.

479460.Title: Mask Shard
479460.Description:
Can only be reached in [ACT 3.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

At the very top of the [Brightvein](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480199). After a length platforming sequence, use [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288) to reach the room it's in.

479466.Title: Pin Badge
479466.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Pinstress](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479464)

**Effect:** Reduces charge time of Needle Strike

479470.Title: Craw Summons
479470.Description:
Can appear next to any bench you rest or log out on in [Act 3.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Used for unlocking [Craw's Door](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479575)

479494.Title: Watcher at the Edge
479494.Description:
The encounter starts with the boss as a statue in the arena. Playing the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) will awaken him and start the fight. You only need to do this once, he will remain active towards the far end of the arena in future attempts. 

**Reward:**
- [Grey Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479630) (Bellhome Decoration)

479495.Title: Rune Harp
479495.Description: Where Conductor Ballador would be in Act 3.

479496.Title: Shardillard
479496.Description:
Hiding on the ceiling in a room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480944).

Defeat 5 to complete the [hunter's notes.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480162)

479497.Title: Silkshot (Weaver)
479497.Description:
Bring the [Ruined Tool](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478457) and 1 [Craftmetal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/craftmetal) to the table near the [Bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478382) to create it.

**Effect:** Uses shell canisters and the wielder's own Silk to fire.

479498.Title: Breakable Wall
479498.Description: Can be broken from the east side.

479503.Title: Arena Battle
479503.Description:
**Enemies:**
- Choir Hornhead x1 + Choir Flyer x1 + Choristor x1
- Choir Hornhead x1 + Choir Elder x1 + Choir Pouncer x1
- Choir Flyer x1 + Reed x1 + Choir Bellbearer x1
- Choristor x1 + Choir Pouncer x1 + Choir Flyer x1 + Choir Bellbearer x1
- Vaultkeeper x1

479504.Title: Breakable Wall
479504.Description: At the bottom of a tunnel behind another [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479399).

479506.Title: Breakable Floor
479506.Description: Detach the object hanging above it.

479509.Title: Needolin Lore
479509.Description:
Discovered when playing the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) in front of a fountain inside the building.

_...Spirit of the wood..._

_...To seed... To grow..._

_...Health of the heart..._

_...Distant reach... distant life..._

479510.Title: Underpoke
479510.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479511.Title: Underloft
479511.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479512.Title: Underworker
479512.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479513.Title: Super Secret Room
479513.Description:
In the upper-right corner of the first secret room. Stand in the position seen in the screenshot, jump, then move right at the height of the jump to get inside.

Watch out - it's home to a [Marrowmaw](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478224).

479518.Title: Hunter's March Map
479518.Description: Sold by Shakra (found [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478003) or [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479060)) for 70 Rosaries.

479521.Title: Breakable Wall
479521.Description: Hit the vines a few times to clear a path.

479522.Title: Breakable Wall
479522.Description: Attack from the western side to return to the main room.

479529.Title: Bellhart Map
479529.Description: Sold by [Shakra](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479054) for 40 Rosaries, when you find her in [Shellwoods](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478171) onwards.

479542.Title: Surface Memento
479542.Description: **Required:** Play the Needolin in the house on the far right side of the Nameless Town to make it drop from the ceiling.

479543.Title: Skull Scuttler
479543.Description: Defeat 35 to complete the hunter's notes.

479544.Title: Beastfly
479544.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479545.Title: Arena Battle
479545.Description:
In a room entered from above.

**Enemies:**
- Beastfly x1
- Skull Scuttler x2
- Beastfly x2
- Skull Brute x1

479546.Title: Skull Brute
479546.Description:
On a high-up platform.

Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479547.Title: Caranid
479547.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479549.Title: Lever
479549.Description: On the ground. Raises the box suspended above it.

479550.Title: Kilik
479550.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479551.Title: Pilgrim Pouncer
479551.Description: Defeat 35 to complete the hunter's notes.

479552.Title: Winged Pilgrim
479552.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479553.Title: Smelt Shoveller
479553.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479554.Title: Flintstone Flyer
479554.Description:
Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Tip: Hit their projectiles back at them!_

479555.Title: Hardbone Hopper
479555.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479556.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479556.Description: Hit the explosive rock (then stand back a bit) to create a new path.

479557.Title: Skarrwing
479557.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479558.Title: Skarrlid
479558.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479559.Title: Skarr Scout
479559.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479560.Title: Brushflit
479560.Description:
Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Tip: You'll need to be quick, or used a ranged attack!_

479561.Title: Fertid
479561.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479562.Title: Flapping Fertid
479562.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479563.Title: Skarr Stalker
479563.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479564.Title: Vicious Caranid
479564.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479565.Title: Lavalug
479565.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

479566.Title: Flintflame Flyer
479566.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479567.Title: Smokerock Sifter
479567.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479568.Title: Breakable Wall
479568.Description: Attack the wooden supports on the platform below.

479570.Title: Hoker
479570.Description: Defeat 14 to complete the hunter's notes.

479571.Title: Pilgrim Groveller
479571.Description: Defeat 35 to complete the hunter's notes.

479572.Title: Breakable Wall
479572.Description: Hit the explosive rock to open a new path.

479573.Title: Pilgrim Hornfly
479573.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479574.Title: Pilgrim Hulk
479574.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479577.Title: Overgrown Pilgrim
479577.Description:
Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Tip: Hit their projectiles out of the air!_

479579.Title: Aknid
479579.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479580.Title: Craw Memento
479580.Description:
**Required:** Defeat [Crawfather](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479578)

Unlocked at the same time as a 'Crawbell', also used to decorate the bellhome. It generates rosaries and shell shards over time.

479591.Title: Spear Skarr
479591.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479619.Title: Magnetite
479619.Description: Inspect it to unlock its entry in the [Materium](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479119).

479625.Title: Bench - The Cradle
479625.Description: In a [secret tunnel](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479611) that leads to the surface and [Mister Mushroom 7](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479330)

479626.Title: Garpid
479626.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479627.Title: Imoba
479627.Description: Defeat 4 to complete the hunter's notes.

479628.Title: Skrill
479628.Description:
On the surface, above the last [Mister Mushroom's](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479330) location

Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479629.Title: Nameless Town
479629.Description: A ruined town free from its population and its name. Home of the [Surface Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479542).

479634.Title: Sprintmaster Memento
479634.Description: **Required:** Complete a race with [Sprintmaster Swift](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479192) after you deliver three hearts to the Snail Shamans in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

479635.Title: Hunter's Memento
479635.Description:
**Required:** Complete the [Hunter's Journal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478043)

_Note: The journal entries for [Shakra](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479822), [Garmond & Zaza](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479361), and [Summoned Saviour](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480310) are not required._

479638.Title: Guardian's Memento
479638.Description:
ACT 3

**Required:** 
- Beat [Shrine Guardian Seth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479401)
- Find [Seth in Greymoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479407)
- Find [Seth in Shellwood](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479640)
- Find [Seth in Grand Gate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480277)
- Find [Seth in Fleatopia](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479641)
- Beat Seth's high scores in all minigames in caravan games
- Talk to [Seth in Fleatopia](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479641)

479641.Title: Seth - Fleatopia
479641.Description:
**Previous Location:** [Grand Gate](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480277)

May only appear here after completing [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387) / [Ecstasy of the End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479444)

479653.Title: Crest of Hunter Upgrade 2
479653.Description:
**Required:** Unlock the crests below, then speak to [Eva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228)
- [Crest of Wanderer](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478240)
- [Crest of Beast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478020)
- [Crest of Reaper](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478156)
- [Crest of Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478745)
- [Crest of Witch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478815)

**Effect:** Focus bar gets bigger; fill it to deal even more damage.

**Slots:**
- 2 Red
- 2 Blue
- 2 Yellow

479654.Title: Sylphsong
479654.Description:
**Required:** Use 18 Memory Lockets and bind [Eva](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228)

**Effect:** Silk will regenerate while resting at a bench

479655.Title: Skull Tyrant - Second Encounter
479655.Description:
Triggered by sitting on the bench some time after defeating the [Skull Tyrant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478136) in The Marrow. May be linked to completing a certain number of Wishes afterwards.

**Reward:**
- None

479671.Title: Arena Battle
479671.Description:
**Enemies**:
- 1 Choristor, 1 Reed
- 1 Choir Flyer, 1 Choir Pouncer, 1 Clawmaiden
- 1 Choristor, 1 Choir Bellbearer
- 2 Reed, 1 Clawmaiden (after 1 Reed defeated)

479672.Title: Locked Gate
479672.Description: Opened by standing on a button on the eastern side.

479675.Title: Curvesickle
479675.Description:
Act 3

**Required:** [Curveclaw](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478604) - hit each of the four targets with one thrown Curveclaw, then give the Curveclaw to the Skarr Rogue that appears. Upon resting at a bench and returning to the area, the Curvesickle will be waiting for you.

**Effect:** Throwing weapon with a boomerang effect. Acts as a permanent upgrade to the Curveclaw

_This upgrade is not a requirement for 100% completion._

479676.Title: Breakable Floor
479676.Description: Hit the explosive rock to create a path for the hot air to flow through. It'll get you closer to Greymoor.

479677.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479677.Description: Above a stream of hot air. Hit the explosive rock to clear a path.

479678.Title: Breakable Floor
479678.Description: Hit the explosive rock to create a stream of air powerful enough to carry you into Greymoor.

479679.Title: Craw
479679.Description:
Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

Drops Ragpelt during the [Crawbug Clearing](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478208) Wish.

479680.Title: Tallcraw
479680.Description:
Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

Drops 5x Ragpelt per kill during the [Crawbug Clearing](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478208) Wish.

**Note:** In Act 3, they move into the area near this [Void Mass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479532).

479681.Title: Mite
479681.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479682.Title: Squatcraw
479682.Description:
Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

Drops 4x Ragpelt per kill during the [Crawbug Clearing](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478208) Wish.

**Note:** In Act 3, they move into the area near this [Void Mass](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479532).

479683.Title: Pilgrim Guide
479683.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479684.Title: Arena Battle
479684.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 2x Dreg Catcher
- 1x Thread Raker

During Act 3:
- 2x Dreg Catcher
- 1x Dreg Catcher + 1x Roachcatcher
- 2x Threadraker

479685.Title: Dreg Catcher
479685.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479686.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479686.Description: Hit the wooden support to open a shortcut into the corridor above.

479687.Title: Arena Battle
479687.Description:
Inside the [Chapel of the Reaper](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478155).

**Enemies:**
- Silk Snipper x1
- Dreg Catcher x2
- Thread Raker x1
- Silk Snipper x2

479688.Title: Breakable Floor
479688.Description: Hi the rope suspending the platform to open a new path. This will also create a stream of air for you to return to the area above.

479689.Title: Shell Shards
479689.Description: On the ceiling in an area next to the water. Guarded by a Mitemother.

479690.Title: Breakable Floor
479690.Description: Hit the rope above it to create a new path.

479692.Title: Creepy Surprise
479692.Description: Before killing [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138), quit the game (or just return to the main menu) after resting on the [Bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476884) in the middle of Bellhart. When you resume playing, Hornet will be dangling from a web like the rest of the townsfolk.

479694.Title: Arena Battle
479694.Description:
**Enemies:**
- 2x Phacia
- 1x Splinterhorn + 1x Splinter
- 1x Splinterhorn + 1x Splinter + 1x Phacia

479695.Title: Breakable Wall
479695.Description: At the end of a platforming challenge where you bounce on several white flowers in a row.

479697.Title: Secret Room
479697.Description: **Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189) - jump up the leftmost wall repeatedly to get inside.

479699.Title: Breakable Wall
479699.Description: At the bottom of a path patrolled by a [Winged Furm](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478195). Attack from the western side.

479700.Title: Breakable Wall
479700.Description: Near the bottom of a pit patrolled by two Winged Furm. Attack from the eastern side.

479702.Title: Locked Trapdoor
479702.Description:
After defeating [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138), wall jump up the area to the left off the boss arena to hit a lever and unlock the trapdoor above it.

**Required:** [Cling Grip](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478189)

479704.Title: Pondcatcher Reed
479704.Description: **Required:** Defeat [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138). Moves to Shellwood soon after the town's curse is lifted.

479708.Title: Breakable Wall
479708.Description: At the water's edge. Attack from the western side to reveal a [Mask Shard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478091).

479712.Title: Moving Platform
479712.Description: Press a button on the eastern side of the lava pit to activate it, creating a speedier passage between The Marrow and the Deep Docks.

479714.Title: Breakable Wall
479714.Description: On your right immediately after climbing the [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479713).

479721.Title: Flintstone
479721.Description: Inspect it to unlock its entry in the [Materium](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479119).

479726.Title: Curveclaw
479726.Description: Second location of the [Curveclaw](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478604) Tool, if it was not obtained before [Mottled Skarr](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478602)'s death.

479727.Title: A Vassal Lost
479727.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Speak to [Steel Seer Zi](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479728) to begin.

**Resting Sites:**
- [Resting Site - Moss Grotto](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479826)
- [Resting Site - Far Fields](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479730)
- [Resting Site - Putrified Ducts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479735)
- [Resting Site - High Halls](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479739)
- [Resting Site - Shellwood](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479827)
- [Resting Site - Sands of Karak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480822)

_Note: Resting sites seem to appear in different places for different players. Look for their icons on your map, and let us know where they spawned for you!_

**Reward:**
- [Growstone](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479742)

479728.Title: Steel Seer Zi
479728.Description: Can only be reached in Steel Soul mode.

479729.Title: Secret Room
479729.Description: Can only be entered in **Steel Soul** mode.

479730.Title: Resting Site - Far Fields
479730.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Has a chance to appear in this location after beginning the [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish.

479735.Title: Resting Site - Putrified Ducts
479735.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Has a chance to appear in this location after beginning the [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish.

479736.Title: Judge
479736.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479737.Title: Pharlid
479737.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479738.Title: Pilgrim Hiker
479738.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479739.Title: Resting Site - High Halls
479739.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Has a chance to appear in this location after beginning the [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish.

479740.Title: Summoned Saviour
479740.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Appears here after finding all Resting Sites for [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish

479741.Title: Sula
479741.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Spoken to after defeating the [Summoned Saviour](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479740).

479742.Title: Growstone
479742.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

**Required:** Complete [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727)

**Effect:** Unlimited Shell Shards (with cooldown)

479743.Title: Inaccessible Passage
479743.Description: This passage is inaccessible, though it has map data. The end of the passage (if accessed through no-clip) contains a doorway that leads back to itself if entered, giving the impression that this passage is unfinished content that was left in the game.

479744.Title: Void Tendrils
479744.Description: Read the [Lore](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479287) to complete the hunter's notes.

479746.Title: Underscrub
479746.Description:
One level below the tunnel's right entrance.

Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479750.Title: Passage
479750.Description: If this area is in the game, the current way to access it is unknown - even on a 100% complete Steel Soul save file, there's seemingly no way in.

479755.Title: Elder Pilgrim
479755.Description:
Defeat 5 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Note: This area randomly spawns different Pilgrim enemies after you take the [Crest of Wanderer](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478240)._

479820.Title: Rhinogrund
479820.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Defeat 2 to complete the hunter's notes.

479822.Title: Shakra
479822.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes, by completing [Trail's End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479237) and hitting the ring here. This cannot be done after starting [ACT 3.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

479824.Title: Lever
479824.Description: Spawns [Vaultborn](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480008) enemies in the previous areas.

479826.Title: Resting Site - Moss Grotto
479826.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Has a chance to appear in this location after beginning the [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish.

479827.Title: Resting Site - Shellwood
479827.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Has a chance to appear in this location after beginning the [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish.

479836.Title: Undercrank
479836.Description: Defeat 4 to complete the hunter's notes.

479837.Title: Undersweep
479837.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479843.Title: Lever
479843.Description: Opens a tiny side-room with nothing inside.

479844.Title: Breakable Wall
479844.Description: On your right after climbing a vertical tunnel. Leads to a platforming challenge and [Frayed Rosary String](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478582).

479846.Title: Shell Shards
479846.Description: In the maze. Climb one level above the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479844), then jump over the spinning blades to your left to find it.

479848.Title: Lever
479848.Description:
At the very top of the maze. To reach it, go through the right wall and Cling Grip your way up past a spinning blade.

Opens access to the next area.

479853.Title: Locked Trapdoor
479853.Description: Hit the lever above it to unlock a path back down to the room below.

479858.Title: Winged Lifeseed
479858.Description:
Appears when the [Plasmium Cocoon](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479277) is ruptured.

Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

479862.Title: Squirrm
479862.Description:
In a sandy pit. Will only appear after using the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) for a while. Can also be killed with the [Snare Setter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479071), if you leave the room.

Defeat 4 to complete the hunter's notes.

479865.Title: Lever
479865.Description: At the end of a tunnel that runs alongside the elevator. Opens the wall next to it.

479867.Title: Platforming Puzzle
479867.Description:
A tricky platforming sequence can be found here, leading to / from the Choral Chambers and a [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478586). Each platform is linked to another in pairs - standing on one will lift the position of another, and vice versa.

_Tip: You can hit the bottom of the platforms to change their positions, too!_

479869.Title: Lever
479869.Description: At the 'end' of the corridor. Opens a trapdoor to the tunnels below.

479871.Title: Lever
479871.Description: In the tunnels. Opens a trapdoor to re-enter the main corridor.

479872.Title: Lace
479872.Description: Appears here for a brief chat, in which Hornet delivers an incredibly hard line.

479878.Title: Needolin Lore
479878.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) here for lore.

_...Beauty... faded..._

_...All our glory..._

_...All our wealth..._

_All to end... like this?_

479880.Title: Reed
479880.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479882.Title: Choir Bellbearer
479882.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479883.Title: Choristor
479883.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

479885.Title: Choir Pouncer
479885.Description: Defeat 30 to complete the hunter's notes.

479886.Title: Choir Flyer
479886.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479887.Title: Choir Hornhead
479887.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479897.Title: Envoy
479897.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479899.Title: Clawmaiden
479899.Description:
Summoned by the [Envoy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479897).

Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479900.Title: Secret Room
479900.Description: Jump at the wall to get inside.

479902.Title: Rosary
479902.Description: Inside a [Secret Room](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479900) - and guarded by a Drapemite.

479904.Title: Locked Trapdoor
479904.Description: Hit the lever next to it.

479906.Title: Choir Elder
479906.Description: Defeat 6 to complete the hunter's notes.

479907.Title: Locked Trapdoor
479907.Description: Hit the lever next to it.

479918.Title: Grand Reed
479918.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

479935.Title: Silkeater
479935.Description: At the end of a tunnel beneath the [Breakable Floor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479934). Look for a lever, then follow the tunnel down towards the steam and continue to the left.

479936.Title: Locked Door
479936.Description: **Required:** Opens from the western side after defeating [Lace](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479088) in the Cradle

479938.Title: Cogworker
479938.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479939.Title: Lever
479939.Description: Rotates the large round mechanism below.

479940.Title: Lever
479940.Description: Rotates the large round mechanism above.

479961.Title: Cogwork Choirbug
479961.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479962.Title: Cogwork Crawler
479962.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479963.Title: Cogwork Spine
479963.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

479964.Title: Arena Battle
479964.Description:
**Enemies:**
- Cogwork Choirbug x2
- Cogwork Spine x3 + Cogwork Cleanser x1
- Cogworker x2
- Cogwork Choirbug x1 + Cogwork Defender x1
- Cogworker x2
- Cogwork Defender x1

479968.Title: Cogwork Cleanser
479968.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

479970.Title: Locked Gate
479970.Description: Hit the wheel on the western side's ceiling multiple times to open it (and be ready to fight a [Cogwork Clapper](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479971).)

479971.Title: Cogwork Clapper
479971.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the Hunter's Notes.

479975.Title: Lever
479975.Description: Temporarily opens a passage into the tunnels below.

479976.Title: Lever
479976.Description: Approach from the eastern side to open a one-way door out of the tunnels.

479978.Title: Lever
479978.Description: Approach from the west to temporarily open a room where the [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478618) is hidden.

479982.Title: Cogwork Defender
479982.Description: Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

479984.Title: Locked Gate
479984.Description: Hit a wheel on the western side multiple times to open it.

479985.Title: Lever
479985.Description: Rotates the large round mechanism next to it.

479987.Title: Lever
479987.Description: Rotates the large round mechanism next to it.

479990.Title: Box
479990.Description: Hit the box from the eastern side to create a path.

479991.Title: Scrollreader
479991.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

479992.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479992.Description: Hit the wooden support from below to open it.

479993.Title: Breakable Ceiling
479993.Description: Hit the loose panel to open a shortcut to Songclave.

479994.Title: Lampbearer
479994.Description: Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

479995.Title: Skynx
479995.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Replaces [Styx](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478266). You can sell your Silkeaters to it for rosaries.

479996.Title: Shell Satchel
479996.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

**Effect:** Increases the quantity of crafted tools.

479998.Title: Breakable Floor
479998.Description: At the end of a secret passage to the left of the [bench](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478403). Drop down to break it.

479999.Title: Vaultkeeper
479999.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

480000.Title: Box
480000.Description: Hit it from the western side to [move it to the right.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480003)

480002.Title: Box
480002.Description: Hit it from the western side to move it to the right, providing enough height to hit the [Box (Second Position)](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480003).

480003.Title: Box (Second Position)
480003.Description:
After hitting the [Box](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480000) once, you can find it here.

Hit [this second Box](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480002) to get high enough to hit it from below, moving it up toward a [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478675).

480004.Title: Box
480004.Description: Hit it from below to move it up and reach the [Rosaries](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478672).

480005.Title: Giant Drapemite
480005.Description: Defeat 6 to complete the hunter's notes.

480006.Title: Breakable Wall
480006.Description: Two breakable walls in rapid succession hide a [Shell Shard](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478678) deposit.

480007.Title: Breakable Ceiling
480007.Description: Hit the ceiling to lower a panel.

480008.Title: Vaultborn
480008.Description:
Appears after hitting a nearby [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479824).

Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

480009.Title: Locked Trapdoor
480009.Description: **Required:** Defeat [Trobbio](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478690) to reach the lever beneath it.

480011.Title: Breakable Сeiling
480011.Description: Attack the wooden supports from below.

480012.Title: Passage
480012.Description: Hit the levers on either side to open a new path.

480013.Title: Locked Trapdoor
480013.Description: Hit a lever on the northern side to unlock it.

480014.Title: Needolin Lore
480014.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) next to the corpses for some lore.

_...This ceaseless sound..._

_...No more..._

_...Remember... silence..._

_...Remember... peace..._

480015.Title: Needolin Lore
480015.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) next to the corpse for some lore.

_Divine Silk..._

_We sang your chains..._

_We prayed a cage..._

_Damned bugs..._

480016.Title: Locked Trapdoor
480016.Description: Unlocked by a lever above it.

480017.Title: Shard Bundle
480017.Description: Held by a corpse at the bottom of a pit.

480018.Title: Breakable Wall
480018.Description: Attack from the eastern side to reveal a [Spool Fragment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478704).

480019.Title: Lever
480019.Description: Temporarily opens a small room holding [Shell Shards](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478708).

480020.Title: Fan
480020.Description: Hit the wheel a few times to create an air current.

480021.Title: Cogwork Underfly
480021.Description: Defeat 25 to complete the hunter's notes.

480022.Title: Cogwork Hauler
480022.Description: Defeat 12 to complete the hunter's notes.

480023.Title: One-Way Door
480023.Description: Attack from the eastern side to temporarily open the door.

480024.Title: Passage
480024.Description:
**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

Hang from the hoop to open it, but be ready for an [ambush.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480025)

480025.Title: Arena Battle
480025.Description:
Begins when you open the [Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480024).

 **Enemies:**
- 1x Underscrub + 1x Undersweep
- 2x Cogwork Hauler
- 1x Underloft + 1x Underpoke
- 1x Cogwork Hauler
- 1x Undercrank
- 2x Cogwork Hauler

480026.Title: Levers
480026.Description: Hit a lever on the eastern side to create a passage. This also spawns a lever with the same function on the other side of the room.

480027.Title: Lever
480027.Description: Temporarily opens a trapdoor to the tunnels below.

480028.Title: Lever
480028.Description: On the lower part of the corridor. Creates a platform above the saws.

480029.Title: Lever
480029.Description: On a ledge only reachable via [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714). Leads to the [Twelfth Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478723)'s room.

480030.Title: Needolin Lore
480030.Description:
Use the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) near the construct's head for lore.

_... WE... ALL... TOGETHER..._

480031.Title: Lever
480031.Description: Creates a hole through the pit's various barriers (and opens up the bottom section).

480032.Title: Lever
480032.Description: Grants access to the south-eastern area.

480033.Title: Breakable Wall
480033.Description: Directly to the right of the [Delver's Drill](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478577) (but can be broken with your regular attacks)

480034.Title: Needolin Lore
480034.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) next to the lore tablet.

_Sister, spider, husk bound to moss,_

_Watch over these bugs born low,_

_Raised up by fervour fostered,_

_Born and caught within our web unknowing._

480035.Title: Breakable Wall
480035.Description: Four breakable walls can be found east of the [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478914)

480036.Title: Dreg Husk
480036.Description:
Appears when you take the [Choral Commandment](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478914).

Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

480037.Title: Lever
480037.Description: Hit it to create a passage to the east.

480038.Title: Lever
480038.Description: At the end of the vents. Temporarily opens a trapdoor to the corridor below.

480039.Title: Hidden Passage
480039.Description:
**Required:** [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288)

(or, Faydown Cloak towards middle -> at max height Clawline -> Cling Grip wall-jump immediately!)

480040.Title: Mortician
480040.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

480042.Title: Arena Battle
480042.Description:
Before fighting [The Unravelled](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478926), you'll need to face:
- 1x Dreg Husk
- 1x Dreg Husk + 1x Dregwheel

480043.Title: Dregwheel
480043.Description:
Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

After defeating [The Unravelled](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478926), they can be summoned by playing the Needolin in the arena.
