480047.Title: Garmond and Zaza - Fifth Encounter
480047.Description: Appear here to help you fight the enemies.

480049.Title: Maestro
480049.Description: Defeat 6 to complete the hunter's notes.

480050.Title: Minister
480050.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

480052.Title: Choir Clapper
480052.Description: Defeat 3 to complete the hunter's notes.

480053.Title: Ring
480053.Description: Hit the wheel to create a [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714) ring in the room below.

480054.Title: Locked Gate
480054.Description: Unlocks from the western side by hitting a wheel multiple times.

480055.Title: Rosary
480055.Description: Hit the lever to drop into the pool and swim to the left side. The rosaries are on a ledge just above the maggot-infested water.

480056.Title: Pillar Puzzle
480056.Description: Hit the levers to make the music notes' lines match up. You'll know you've done it right when the pillar sinks into the floor.

480132.Title: Gargant Gloom
480132.Description: Defeat 4 to complete the hunter's notes.

480133.Title: Gloomsac
480133.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

480134.Title: Shadow Creeper
480134.Description: Defeat 16 to complete the hunter's notes.

480135.Title: Shadow Charger
480135.Description: Defeat 6 to complete the hunter's notes.

480138.Title: Silver Bell
480138.Description:
On the ground behind a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479051).

Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

480139.Title: Silver Bell
480139.Description: Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

480140.Title: Silver Bell
480140.Description:
At the top of the area behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479051)

Has a chance to spawn here after beginning the [Silver Bells](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478206) Wish.

480145.Title: Cragglite
480145.Description:
Appears here some time after the Craggler has been killed.

Defeat 3 to complete the hunter's notes.

480146.Title: Plasmid
480146.Description:
Only appears here in [Act 3.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

480156.Title: Passage
480156.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Opens at the end of [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727).

480162.Title: Shardillard
480162.Description:
Defeat 5 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Does not respawn. Also appears in the following locations:_
- [The Marrow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480160)
- [Deep Docks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480168)
- [Greymoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479496)
- [Far Fields](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479731)
- [Sands of Karak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479213)

480165.Title: Arena Battle
480165.Description:
Begins as you approach the [memory locket.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478246)

**Enemies:**
- 1x Elder Pilgrim
- 1x Winged Pilgrim + 1x Pilgrim Groveller
- 1x Pilgrim Groveller + 1x Pilgrim Pouncer

480169.Title: Breakable Wall
480169.Description: Hit an explosive rock on the western side to break open a new path. Watch out for the blast!

480174.Title: Weighted Belt
480174.Description: If you didn't purchase the [Weighted Belt](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477947) before beginning [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260), it will be found here.

480175.Title: Horn Fragment
480175.Description:
Dropped by the [Savage Beastfly](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478844) upon death.

Used to complete the [Savage Beastfly](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478799) Wish.

480177.Title: Secret Room
480177.Description:
**Required:** [Drifter's Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477971)

Ride the air current all the way up to find plenty of Silk.

480179.Title: Rhinogrund
480179.Description:
Defeat 2 to complete the [hunter's notes.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479820)

If the nearby gate is left open and you die or run away, it will disappear for some time before reappearing inside [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946)'s shop. (This may require you to break the gear above the door, too.)

480182.Title: Pilby - Second Encounter
480182.Description:
Appears sometime after leaving Bone Bottom, outside of Pilgrim's Rest (or inside, if the door is broken).

_Note: May only move here in Act 2 if you spoke to him enough in [Bone Bottom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477835)._

480189.Title: Breakable Wall
480189.Description: Attack from the eastern side after unlocking [Thread Storm](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478061).

480190.Title: Muckmaggot
480190.Description:
Can be killed with [Pimpillo](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478964) or Silk Skills enhanced by [Volt Filament](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479224).

Defeat 100 to complete the hunter's notes.

480191.Title: Sandcarver
480191.Description:
Can be killed with [Pimpillo](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478964), [Conchcutter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479230), and possibly more.

Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

480192.Title: Captured
480192.Description: If the Wardenfly here catches you in its cage, you will be sent [HERE](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478462)

480194.Title: Covetous Pilgrim
480194.Description:
Appears here some time after Shakra leaves. Does not respawn.

Defeat 2 to complete the [hunter's notes.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478300)

480195.Title: Encrusted Heart
480195.Description: If you used the [Conjoined Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479631) as part of the [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387) Objective, you can get the Encrusted Heart from [Crust King Khann](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479392) as a Memento instead.

480196.Title: Arena Battle
480196.Description:
In the basement of the [Chapel of the Wanderer](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478239).

**Enemies:**
- 1x Pilgrim Pouncer + 1x Pilgrim Groveller + 1x Winged Pilgrim
- 1x Winged Pilgrim + 1x Pilgrim Hulk
- 1x Pilgrim Hornfly + 1x Pilgrim Guide
- 1x Pilgrim Hornfly +1x Pilgrim Hulk + 1x Winged Pilgrim

480198.Title: Mnemonord
480198.Description:
Inside the Brightvein. [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288) required.

Defeat 3 to complete the hunter's notes.

480200.Title: Broodling
480200.Description: Appears after defeating the [Broodmother](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479255) and returning to the boss arena

480201.Title: Tool Pouch
480201.Description: If you didn't buy [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946)'s Tool Pouch, it will be sold by [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) in [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

480202.Title: Memory Locket
480202.Description: Sold by [Grindle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478522) in [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260), if it was not purchased from [Mort](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477946) already.

480205.Title: Locked Trapdoor
480205.Description: Hit the rope above it to open a new path.

480206.Title: Stilkin
480206.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

480207.Title: Breakable Wall
480207.Description: At the edge of the room where you turn the lights on.

480208.Title: Needolin Lore
480208.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) while standing near the corpses for some lore.

_...All ours..._

_...All your wishes..._

_...All your will..._

_...None beyond...__

**Enemies:**

- 2x Stilkin Trapper 
- 3x Swamp Squit
- 1x Stilkin Trapper + 1x Stilkin

- [Groal The Great](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478861)

Breaks into 220 shell shards

May only appear here during and after [The Lost Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479244) Wish. Leave and re-enter the room repeatedly to try and make one spawn.

480264.Description: Can only be destroyed from the eastern side.

480265.Title: Breakable Wall
480265.Description: Can only be destroyed from the eastern side. If you're looking for the [Wreath of Purity](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479133), start [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479104).

480267.Title: Void Mass
480267.Description: In the top left corner of the room

Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

Fought in [ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) during the [Heart of the Wild](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479390) objective.

Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

480319.Title: Crawfather
480319.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

480321.Title: Palestag
480321.Description:
Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Tip: Defeat it before fighting the [Clover Dancers](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480322) to ensure it's added to your journal. Defeating the dancers locks you out of Lost Verdania._

480322.Title: Clover Dancers
480322.Description:
Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

_Defeating them locks you out of Lost Verdania, but fully unlocks the Hunter's Journal entries of all enemies in the area - except for [Palestag](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480321)._

480323.Title: Widow
480323.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

480326.Description: Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

480327.Description:
Defeat 1 to complete the hunter's notes.

Defeating him fully unlocks the Hunter's Journal entries for all enemies that exclusively reside within Coral Tower.

480331.Description:

 It may appear in this [second location](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479149) afterwards, however.**

](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480209)

_Tip: The [Wreath of Purity](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479133) negates Maggots. To reach it, start [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479125)._

480387.Title: Covetous Pilgrim
480387.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Defeat 2 to complete the hunter's notes.

Does not respawn, but is also found [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480194) and [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478300)

480389.Description:
Receive the [Hunter's Memento](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479635).

_Note: The journal entries for [Shakra](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479822), [Garmond & Zaza](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479361) & [Summoned Saviour](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480310) are not required._

480390.Title: Needolin Lore
480390.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) inside the [Chapel of the Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478743) - specifically in a secret room to the right of the place where you claim the [Architect Crest](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478745) - for some lore.

_Always another..._

_Our hope..._

_Build... Craft... Pass..._

_Can it end?_

_Always eternal..._

_Designs... divine..._

480391.Title: Needolin Lore
480391.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) near the corpse for some lore.

_"...Held in our hearts..."_

_"...Harden the path..."_

_"...Remembered..."_

_"...Dear one..."_

_"...Suffer no more..."_

_"...Worthy..."_

480396.Title: Needolin Lore
480396.Description:
Use the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) near the construct's head for lore.

_... WE... ALL... TOGETHER..._

480399.Title: Jubilana
480399.Description: Appears here some time after completing [The Wandering Merchant](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478634) Wish. Sells her usual stock.

480400.Title: Breakable Wall
480400.Description: Two breakable walls in rapid succession, broken from the western side, and only reachable after acquiring the [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103).

480401.Title: Second Sentinel - Second Encounter
480401.Description:
After activating the [Automaton](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616), you'll find it fighting an enemy here.

One of two fights you need to witness before [Final Audience](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479245) will become available.

480402.Title: Second Sentinel - Third Encounter
480402.Description:
After activating the [Automaton](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616), you'll find it fighting enemies here.

One of two fights you need to witness before [Final Audience](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479245) will become available.

480408.Title: Arena Battle
480408.Description:
Begins when you find [Sherma](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479179) during the [Balm for The Wounded](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478933) Wish.

**Enemies:**
- 1x Surgeon
- 2x Mortician
- 2x Surgeon

480409.Title: Surgeon
480409.Description:
Appears during the [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480408).

Defeat 3 to complete the hunter's notes.

480415.Title: Wingmould
480415.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) - Only appears in the Red Memory.

Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

480418.Title: Void Mass
480418.Description:
Begin appearing in [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) as part of the [Dark Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479448) wish.

Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

480431.Title: Lore
480431.Description:
In [Nuu](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478041)'s room. Can only be read after she leaves.

_A scroll detailing the scents and tastes of Pharloom's various bugs and beasts._

480433.Title: Lever
480433.Description: Hit the spinning lever a few times to start up a fan, granting access to the upper area when combined with the [fan down below.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=481099)

480434.Title: Lever
480434.Description: Hit the spinning lever a few times to start up a fan.

480435.Title: Lever
480435.Description: Hit the spinning lever a few times to start up a fan.

480436.Title: Lever
480436.Description: Hit the spinning lever a few times to start up a fan.

480438.Title: Wisp
480438.Description: Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

480440.Title: Burning Bug
480440.Description: Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

480461.Title: Breakable Wall
480461.Description: Breakable from the eastern side, next to a [mask shard.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479151)

480462.Title: Needolin Lore
480462.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) while standing near the Craftmetal for some lore.

_Too tired... Too hungry..._

_In dark, forgotten..._

_Toil no more..._

_Heat... and quiet..._

480463.Title: Locked Trapdoor
480463.Description: Hit a lever above it to unlock a path back down to the Wisp Thicket.

480464.Title: Locked Trapdoor
480464.Description: Hit a lever above it to unlock a path back down.

480465.Title: Breakable Wall
480465.Description: At the edge of a spike pit. Attack from the east.

480467.Title: Breakable Wall
480467.Description: At the edge of a spike pit. Attack from the west.

480469.Title: Void Mass
480469.Description:
Two void masses can be found here.

_Note: May not appear in Steel Soul mode._

480474.Title: Needolin Lore
480474.Description:
In the [Chapel of the Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478743), you can play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) near a construct for some lore.

_...Build... grow..._

_...Our memories... Our record..._

_...Remember..._

_...As it was built..._

_...It shall not end..._

480478.Title: A Hard Day's Work
480478.Description: Run on the treadmill next to [Loam](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478562) for some time to receive a generous salary, courtesy of the Citadel - one rosary bead!

480479.Title: Freshfly
480479.Description:
Defeat 20 to complete the hunter's notes.

Spawned by the [Broodmother](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479255) during her fight.

480481.Title: Pendragor
480481.Description: Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

480483.Title: Last Claw
480483.Description: Defeat 6 to complete the hunter's notes. Only appear during the fight with [Skarrsinger Karmelita](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479198).

480485.Title: Craw Juror
480485.Description:
Defeat 15 to complete the hunter's notes.

Part of the [Crawfather](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479578) boss fight.

480486.Title: Tallcraw Juror
480486.Description:
Defeat 10 to complete the hunter's notes.

Part of the [Crawfather](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479578) boss fight.

480487.Title: Squatcraw Juror
480487.Description:
Defeat 8 to complete the hunter's notes.

Part of the [Crawfather](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479578) boss fight.

480493.Title: Druid's Eyes
480493.Description:
Deliver four extra Mossberries to the Druid for an upgrade to the [Druid's Eye](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478255).

**Effect:** Upon taking damage, more silk is formed

_This upgrade is not a requirement for 100% completion._

480498.Title: Lace
480498.Description: Appears here if you enter the citadel for the first time via the Underworks (by passing through Sinner's Road and the Exhaust Organ.)

480499.Title: Hidden Passage
480499.Description: At the edge of the pit leading toward the Bilewater area. Hug the left wall (watch out for a falling rock), jump up, and continue left.

480500.Title: Levers
480500.Description: Temporarily creates a passage between the two sides of the room. Reached via [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480499).

480501.Title: Lever
480501.Description:
Hit the spinning lever a few times to start a fan, then stand on the button next to it to create a new path.

Reached by following a path from the [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480499) past the [Levers](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480500).

480502.Title: Locked Gate
480502.Description:
While the door is still locked, it is invisible from the western side. It can be opened from the eastern side. 

At the end challenge that starts with this [Ring](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478679), unlocked via [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714), before taking you into a [Hidden Passage](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480499) and beyond. Once you're back in an area where you can see the sky, head left and get ready for some combat before the gate is reached.

480504.Title: Needolin Lore
480504.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) while standing near the pilgrim after his burial for some lore.

_Citadel..._

_Sacred... path..._

_Holy... reward..._

_Pilgrimage..._

480506.Title: Needolin Lore
480506.Description:
Play [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) in front of the mirror, found on the first left while climbing the shortcut elevator shaft, for some lore.

_Why us, Sister?_

_She spun us to fade..._

_Why us?_

_She spun us to break..._

480517.Title: Garmond and Zaza
480517.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Before [Hero's Call](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479445), they'll turn up to help you deal with the enemies.

480520.Title: Gilly - Fourth Encounter
480520.Description: Remains here until you accept [The Hidden Hunter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479446)

480619.Title: Needolin Lore
480619.Description:
Use the Needolin in front of the desk where the [Snare Setter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479071) is found.

_...To bind her... tight..._

_...To keep us free..._

_...Our runes... Our Silk..._

_...Is it done?_

480620.Title: Box Shortcut
480620.Description: Only accessible by going through Underworks. Hit the box from the western side to open access.

480621.Title: Needolin Lore
480621.Description:
Right at the altar where you get the Ruined Tool.

_Strength enough_

_Strength beyond our silk_

_To build, to hope_

_To keep us free_

480628.Title: Lore
480628.Description:
Appears after defeating the [Palestag](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479408).

_Two children born entwined, apart,_

_Two children marked to rule,_

_They danced, they sang, proved blades beyond,_

_But none forgot their birth,_

_For lovers born on beat exact shall be forever cursed._

480629.Title: Gilly - Fifth Encounter
480629.Description: Appears here after defeating [Skarrsinger Karmelita](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479198) and completing [The Hidden Hunter](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479446).

480658.Title: Needolin Lore
480658.Description:
In a room that is only accessible with [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103) after defeating [Disgraced Chef Lugoli](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478992). 

_For you all..._

_Shells to soak... and define..._


_Pharloom's flavour..._
_Preserved... remembered..._

_This holy taste..._

_From you all..._

_Pharloom's soul..._

_Essence... true essence..._

480822.Title: Resting Site - Sands of Karak
480822.Description:
**Steel Soul mode only!**

Has a chance to appear in this location after beginning the [A Vassal Lost](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479727) Wish.

480824.Title: Secret Room
480824.Description: Jump up the left wall to get inside. Home to two Silk Flowers.

480826.Title: Needolin Lore
480826.Description: Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) near a corpse here for some lore.

480827.Title: Weapon Upgrades
480827.Description:
Unlocked by [Pinmaster Plinney](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478210).

**Needle Upgrades:** 
- Sharpened Needle
    - Speak to Plinney after defeating [Widow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478138)
- Shining Needle
    - Complete the [Pinmaster's Oil](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478211) Wish
- Hivesteel Needle
    - Complete the [Great Taste of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478889) Wish and hand over 450 Rosaries
- Pale Steel Needle
    - Complete the [Ecstasy of the End](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479444) Wish and hand over 680 Rosaries

_Fully upgrading your weapon is a requirement for 100% completion._

480936.Title: Shell Shards
480936.Description: At the end of a corridor entered from the eastern side.

480937.Title: Garmond and Zaza
480937.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Fighting enemies near the Void Mass.

480938.Title: Breakable Ceiling
480938.Description: Hit the explosive rock to clear a path.

480939.Title: Breakable Floor
480939.Description: Hit the explosive rock in the spike pit to open a path.

480940.Title: Breakable Ceiling
480940.Description: Hit the explosive rock to clear a path.

480941.Title: Breakable Сeiling
480941.Description: Hit the explosive rock to clear a path, but watch out for falling rocks.

480942.Title: Locked Door
480942.Description:
Unlocked by hitting a lever on the eastern side. To reach it, start the platforming challenge [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480938).

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

480943.Title: Locked Gate
480943.Description:
Unlocks from the western side, when the nearby [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479376) is defeated.

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

480947.Title: Needolin Lore
480947.Description:
In the area above [Styx](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478266). [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288) required to reach it.

_The one to fear..._

_Who is me?_

_The one who serves..._

_My strength or theirs?_

_Who to be?_

_The weak must serve..._

_The one who breeds..._

480948.Title: Memory Locket
480948.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

If the [Volatile Flintbeetles](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478221) Wish wasn't completed, the Locket can be found here.

480949.Title: Rosary
480949.Description: In the first path on the right when falling down from the room above.

480950.Title: Rosary
480950.Description:
In a secret room, entered from below.

**Required:** [Faydown Cloak](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479103)

480951.Title: Breakable Wall
480951.Description: Attack from the western side after swimming through some water. Leads to a [Weaver Effigy](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478794).

480952.Title: Breakable Wall
480952.Description: Attack from the eastern side after exiting the [Chapel of the Witch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478793).

480953.Title: Breakable Wall
480953.Description: Two breakable walls in rapid succession, leading to a [Rosary String](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478795).  Attack from the western side.

480954.Title: Breakable Wall
480954.Description: Three breakable walls in rapid succession. Hit them from the eastern side after exiting the [Chapel of the Witch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478793).

480955.Title: Breakable Сeiling
480955.Description: Hit it from below after exiting the [Chapel of the Witch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478793).

480956.Title: Steel Spines
480956.Description:
Sold by [Crull and Benjin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478355) for 160 Rosaries during the [Infestation Operation](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478814) Wish.

Can also be collected here for free in Act 3.

480957.Title: Needolin Lore
480957.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) near the cages at the bottom of the room for some lore.

_...Eternal..._

_That we may pray..._

_Holy Silk..._

_That we may sing..._

_Highest... holy..._

_That we may bow..._

_Your will... your bounty..._

_Your gift... divine..._

_Spun... Served... Sacrificed..._

_By your grace..._

480958.Title: Needolin Lore
480958.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) in the room behind the [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479096) for some lore.

_Spin... Bind... Punish..._

_Our mother... true..._

_Wake... Wake... Wake..._

_Glory to you..._

_Devotion to you..._

_Our light divine..._

_Of the first... the last..._

_We hear you!_

480984.Title: Breakable Floor
480984.Description: Break through a [Breakable Wall](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478869) up above and snap the chain holding a heavy block to break it.

480985.Title: Locked Gate
480985.Description: Unlocked by hitting a lever on the eastern side, after traversing the tunnels beneath the [Breakable Floor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480984).

480991.Title: Second Sentinel - Fourth Encounter
480991.Description:
After activating the [Automaton](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478616), you'll find it fighting an enemy here.

One of two fights you need to witness before [Final Audience](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479245) will become available.

480999.Title: Levers
480999.Description: Create a passage between the sides of the corridor. Reached via [Breakable Ceiling](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480997)

481000.Title: Heavy Rosary Necklace
481000.Description: Held by a corpse on a ledge, reached via [Breakable Ceiling](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=480997).

481006.Title: Garmond and Zaza
481006.Description: Appear here some time after unlocking the [Final Audience](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479245) wish.

481022.Title: Garmond and Zaza
481022.Description: The dynamic duo may aid you in the nearby [Arena Battle](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479420) after beating them in a friendly duel [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479361).

481024.Title: Nuu - Fifth Encounter
481024.Description: Appears here some time after defeating the [Voltvyrm](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479223).

481030.Title: Flea Finder
481030.Description:
Rescue half of Pharloom's lost fleas.

Our full guide to their locations can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/lost-fleas)

481031.Title: Transported
481031.Description:
Open all of the Citadel's Ventrica Stations.

- [Ventrica Station - Grand Bellway](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478376)
- [Ventrica Station - Underworks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478422)
- [Ventrica Station - Choral Chambers](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478424)
- [Ventrica Station - Memorium](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478425)
- [Ventrica Station - First Shrine](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478427)
- [Ventrica Station - High Halls](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478445)
- [Ventrica Station - Terminus](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478426)

481033.Title: Extended
481033.Description:
Acquire all Spool Fragments.

Our full guide to their locations can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/spool-fragments)

481034.Title: Connected
481034.Description:
Open all of Pharloom's bellways.
- [Bellway - The Marrow](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477882)
- [Bellway - Bone Bottom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477883)
- [Bellway - Deep Docks](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477905)
- [Bellway - Far Fields](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477933)
- [Bellway - Bellhart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478029)
- [Bellway - Greymoor](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478037)
- [Bellway - Shellwood](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478178)
- [Bellway - Blasted Steps](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478308)
- [Bellway - Grand Bellway](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478374)
- [Bellway - The Slab](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478390)
- [Bellway - Putrified Ducts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478411)
- [Bellway - Bilewater](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478447)

481035.Title: Consumed
481035.Description:
Claim all Crests.
- Crest of Hunter (Unlocked by Default - can be upgraded [here](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478228))
- [Crest of Reaper](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478156)
- [Crest of Beast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478020)
- [Crest of Wanderer](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478240)
- [Crest of Architect](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478745)
- [Crest of Witch](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478815)
- [Crest of Shaman](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479384)

481036.Title: Cartographer
481036.Description:
Acquire a map of each area.

Our full guide to their locations can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/area-maps)

481038.Title: Masked
481038.Description:
Acquire all Mask Shards.

Our full guide to their locations can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/mask-shards)

481041.Title: Arsenal
481041.Description:
Acquire all Tools.

Our full guide to their locations can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/trinkets)

481042.Title: Completion
481042.Description:
Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game.

Our checklist for 100% completion can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/checklist)

481043.Title: Fleafriend
481043.Description:
Rescue all of Pharloom's lost fleas and receive their final gift.

Our full guide to their locations can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/guides/lost-fleas)

481044.Title: Speedrunner
481044.Description: Complete the game in under 5 hours.

481045.Title: Speed Completion
481045.Description:
Achieve a 100% game completion and finish the game in under 30 hours.

Our checklist for 100% completion can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/checklist)

481046.Title: Steel Soul
481046.Description: Finish the game in Steel Soul Mode.

481047.Title: Steel Heart
481047.Description:
Achieve a 100% game completion and finish the game in Steel Soul Mode.

Our checklist for 100% completion can be found [here.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/checklist)

481051.Title: Lever
481051.Description: Hit it to start an air current that will carry you to the [Lost Flea](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478416).

481061.Title: Vog - Fleatopia
481061.Description:
**Required:** Find [Vog](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479138) in Putrified Ducts area

Exchange rosaries to have Lost Fleas marked on your map.

481062.Title: Kratt - Fleatopia
481062.Description:
**Required:** Save [Kratt](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478271)

Give him 10 Rosaries to enter the spa and gradually have your Silk restored.

481099.Title: Lever
481099.Description: Lever opening an air stream allowing access to the airstream above.

481101.Title: Lever
481101.Description: Hit the spinning lever a few times to start up a fan. It leads to a ledge with some harvestable silk.

481111.Title: Breakable Wall
481111.Description:
[ACT 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

Hit it from the western side after using any other Ventrica Station to reach the First Shrine station.

481180.Title: Breakable Wall
481180.Description: Hit the explosive rock to open a new path.

481192.Title: Locked Gate
481192.Description: Hit a lever on the eastern side to unlock it after traversing the magma-filled area below.

481193.Title: Locked Gate
481193.Description: Hit a lever on the eastern side to unlock it after traversing the magma-filled area below.

481212.Title: Jubilana
481212.Description: Appears here some time after defeating the Arena Battle.

481222.Title: Breakable Wall
481222.Description:
In a corridor above the diving bell, reached via [Silk Soar](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479288).

Attack from the eastern side.

481231.Title: Arena Battle
481231.Description:
A second Arena Battle begins in this room after pulling a [Lever](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479824) in the room below.

**Enemies:** 
- 4x Vaultborn
- 4x Vaultborn
- 2x Vaultkeeper

481234.Title: Breakable Wall
481234.Description:
Attack from the eastern side to reveal secret room and some [Rosaries.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478925) 

Watch out for an enemy as you enter.

481239.Title: Shell Shards
481239.Description: On a ledge reached via Clawline.

481241.Title: Secret Room
481241.Description: Jump up the left wall to reach a secret room.

481260.Title: Breakable Wall
481260.Description: Hit it from the eastern side.

481266.Title: Needolin Lore
481266.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) in front of the corpse in the Coral Tower for some lore.

_Remember our strength..._

_All to bow..._

_Now none to resist... But us..._

_Remember our rule..._

_All lost to fear..._

_Alone... against the pale light..._

481268.Title: Lever
481268.Description: At the top of the room, reached through a platforming challenge in the room to the left.

481270.Title: Shortcut
481270.Description: Leads down to The Cradle bench below.

481271.Title: Shortcut
481271.Description: Leads to the surface. To access, break the wall from above by entering the shortcut from the surface.

481432.Title: Parasite... Good?
481432.Description:
If you're captured by a cage-carrying Wardenfly while [cursed](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478792), you won't be sent to the [usual spot](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478462).

Instead, the parasite will lash out, setting Hornet free and killing the would-be kidnapper.

481481.Title: Runt
481481.Description:
Appears if the [Broodfeast](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478865) Wish is not completed by Act 3. 

Speaking to him begins Runtfeast, an effectively identical Wish that tasks you with gathering the same items (and gives the same reward.)

481482.Title: Needolin Lore
481482.Description: In the [secret area's](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479451) room full of silk strands (which can be cut to disable Clawmaiden spawns), the Needolin can be played for lore.

481809.Title: Garmond and Zaza
481809.Description: After spotting Moorwing or after fighting but not defeating it, they can be enlisted to help with the fight.

481810.Title: Moss Mother
481810.Description:
Appears here for a rematch in [ACT 3.](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260)

**Reward:**
- None

481815.Title: Free Quill!
481815.Description:
If you avoid purchasing a quill from [Shakra](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477852), a unique red one can be collected here, near [Trobbio](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478690)'s boss room - though defeating him is not a requirement.

Similarly, a unique purple quill can be found here in Act 3.

The quill you collect will determine the icon of the Map & Quill in the inventory screen.

481820.Title: Sherma
481820.Description: Sherma can appear here if returning shortly after visiting for the first time

481826.Title: Shell Shards
481826.Description: Hit the explosive rock to reveal them.

481830.Title: Pollen Heart
481830.Description: If you used the [Conjoined Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479631) as part of the [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387) Objective, you can get the Pollen Heart from [Nyleth](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479404) as a Memento instead.

481832.Title: Hunter's Heart
481832.Description: If you used the [Conjoined Heart](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479631) as part of the [The Old Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479387) Objective, you can get the Hunter's Heart from [Skarrsinger Karmelita](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479198) as a Memento instead.

481833.Title: Needolin Lore
481833.Description:
Play the Needolin in front of the corpse holding the Weaver Effigy for some lore.

_...I failed you..._

_...Too weak... to return..._

_...Your light..._

_...Forgive my silence..._

481834.Title: Needolin Lore
481834.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) next to the body holding the Reaper crest for some lore.

_"...Sow and Reap..."_

_"...Praise their toil..."_

_"...Remember..."_

_"...Gather... For the many..."_

_"...Honor to the Reapers..."_

**Note:** Will become inaccessible after leaving the area.

481878.Title: Breakable Ceiling
481878.Description: Attack it from below to release several spiky balls. Nothing else to find up there, so it's probably best left alone.

481879.Title: Breakable Wall
481879.Description: Appears in Act 3. Can be destroyed from the eastern side.

481880.Title: Needolin Lore
481880.Description:
Play the [Needolin](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478199) here for some lore.

_The bites... The stench..._

_... So dark..._

_...Trapped..._

_...All turned rotten..._

481881.Title: Passage
481881.Description:
Leads to the Sands of Karak area.

**Required:** [Clawline](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478714)

481882.Title: Needolin Lore
481882.Description: Play the Needolin here for some lore.

481884.Title: Lace
481884.Description: Only appears here if her [Deep Docks boss fight](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476915) was skipped via the Wormways or Flea Caravan.

481885.Title: Lace
481885.Description: Only appears here if her [Deep Docks boss fight](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=476915) was skipped via the Wormways or Flea Caravan.

483152.Title: Needolin Lore
483152.Description:
Play the Needolin near the First Sinner before starting the fight for some lore.

_...First..._

_...Our Silk... ...Our rage..._

_...Faded..._

_...Wait, and hate..._

_...Wait, and die..._

_...Forgotten..._
